## Entry 154
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:50:30.457Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:50:30.457Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_uEZQod9fSqsQmtSzvHmbAdl3",
    "output": "Chunk ID: f8c9a7\nWall time: 0.0523 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 4102\nOutput:\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Path params:** `orgId` (Long)  \n**Response `200`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"orgId\": 1,\n  \"ebOrganizationId\": \"12345678\",\n  \"status\": \"CONNECTED\",\n  \"expiresAt\": \"2026-06-01T00:00:00Z\",\n  \"connectedAt\": \"2026-03-01T10:00:00Z\"\n}\n```\n**Response `404`:** no `organization_auth` record for this org  \n\n---\n\n#### `DELETE /api/v1/admin/orgs/{orgId}/eventbrite/disconnect`\n\nRevokes the Eventbrite token for an org. Sets `status = REVOKED`. All future EB calls for this org will fail with `EbAuthException`.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Path params:** `orgId` (Long)  \n**Response `204`:** disconnected  \n**Response `404`:** no connected token found  \n**Notes:** Does NOT call Eventbrite revoke API (not available in v3). Revocation is internal-only — token record marked `REVOKED`, facades refuse to use it.\n\n---\n\n### 2. Venue Management — `discovery-catalog` module\n\n> **Existing Flow 1 endpoints (unchanged):**\n> - `GET /api/v1/catalog/venues?cityId={cityId}&page={page}&size={size}` — public listing\n>\n> **New Flow 2 endpoints below.** Read endpoints used by `scheduling` internally reuse the existing `GET /api/v1/catalog/venues/{id}`.\n\n---\n\n#### `POST /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues`\n\nCreate a new venue. Persists internally first, then calls `EbVenueService.createVenue()`.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Request body:**\n```json\n{\n  \"name\": \"Grand Theatre\",\n  \"addressLine1\": \"12 MG Road\",\n  \"addressLine2\": \"Indiranagar\",\n  \"cityId\": 3,\n  \"country\": \"IN\",\n  \"zipCode\": \"560001\",\n  \"latitude\": \"12.9716\",\n  \"longitude\": \"77.5946\",\n  \"capacity\": 1200,\n  \"seatingMode\": \"RESERVED\"\n}\n```\n**Response `201`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"id\": 42,\n  \"name\": \"Grand Theatre\",\n  \"cityId\": 3,\n  \"capacity\": 1200,\n  \"seatingMode\": \"RESERVED\",\n  \"eventbriteVenueId\": \"eb-venue-99887\",\n  \"syncStatus\": \"SYNCED\",\n  \"createdAt\": \"2026-03-03T10:00:00Z\"\n}\n```\n**Response `400`:** validation failure (missing required fields)  \n**Response `409`:** venue with same name + city already exists  \n**Response `502`:** EB venue creation failed — venue still persisted internally with `syncStatus = PENDING_SYNC`  \n**Notes:**\n- If EB call fails, the venue is saved internally with `syncStatus = PENDING_SYNC` and a safe `502` is returned. Admin can retry via the sync endpoint.\n- `eventbriteVenueId` is null in the `502` response body.\n\n---\n\n#### `PUT /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/{id}`\n\nUpdate an existing venue. Persists internally, calls `EbVenueService.updateVenue()`, invalidates Redis cache for `(orgId, cityId)`.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Path params:** `id` (Long)  \n**Request body:** same shape as POST (all fields optional — partial update)  \n**Response `200`:** updated `VenueResponse`  \n**Response `404`:** venue not found  \n**Response `502`:** EB update failed — internal update still persisted, `syncStatus` flagged  \n**Notes:**\n- Even on EB failure, the internal record is updated (internal DB is source of truth).\n- Cache invalidated regardless of EB outcome: `snapshotCache.invalidate(orgId, venue.getCityId())`.\n\n---\n\n#### `GET /api/v1/catalog/venues/{id}`\n\nGet a single venue by ID. Used by `scheduling` via internal REST call before conflict validation.\n\n**Auth:** none (public)  \n**Path params:** `id` (Long)  \n**Response `200`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"id\": 42,\n  \"cityId\": 3,\n  \"name\": \"Grand Theatre\",\n  \"address\": \"12 MG Road, Indiranagar\",\n  \"zipCode\": \"560001\",\n  \"latitude\": \"12.9716\",\n  \"longitude\": \"77.5946\",\n  \"capacity\": 1200,\n  \"seatingMode\": \"RESERVED\",\n  \"eventbriteVenueId\": \"eb-venue-99887\",\n  \"syncStatus\": \"SYNCED\"\n}\n```\n**Response `404`:** venue not found  \n**Notes:** This is the endpoint `scheduling` calls internally (via `RestTemplate` / `WebClient`) before conflict detection. It must return `capacity` and `seatingMode` — both were missing in the Flow 1 `VenueResponse`, fixed by the V5 migration + entity/DTO update.\n\n---\n\n#### `POST /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/{id}/sync`\n\n*(COULD)* Manually re-trigger EB venue sync for a venue stuck in `PENDING_SYNC` or `DRIFT_FLAGGED`.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Path params:** `id` (Long)  \n**Response `200`:** updated `VenueResponse` with new `syncStatus`  \n**Response `404`:** venue not found  \n**Response `502`:** EB sync still failing  \n\n---\n\n#### `GET /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged`\n\nList venues with `syncStatus = DRIFT_FLAGGED`. Read by admin dashboard.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Query params:** `orgId` (Long, optional), `page`, `size`  \n**Response `200`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"venues\": [\n    {\n      \"id\": 42,\n      \"name\": \"Grand Theatre\",\n      \"cityId\": 3,\n      \"syncStatus\": \"DRIFT_FLAGGED\",\n      \"lastSyncError\": \"EB capacity changed from 1200 to 800\",\n      \"lastAttemptedAt\": \"2026-03-03T06:00:00Z\"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"pagination\": { \"page\": 0, \"size\": 20, \"total\": 1 }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. Show Slot Lifecycle — `scheduling` module\n\n---\n\n#### `POST /api/v1/scheduling/slots`\n\nCreate a new show slot. Runs conflict detection, gap policy check, persists as `DRAFT`.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Request body:**\n```json\n{\n  \"venueId\": 42,\n  \"title\": \"Rock Night 2026\",\n  \"description\": \"Annual rock festival\",\n  \"startTime\": \"2026-04-15T19:00:00+05:30\",\n  \"endTime\": \"2026-04-15T23:00:00+05:30\",\n  \"seatingMode\": \"GA\",\n  \"capacity\": 1000,\n  \"pricingTiers\": [\n    { \"name\": \"Early Bird\", \"priceAmount\": 499.00, \"currency\": \"INR\", \"quota\": 200, \"tierType\": \"PAID\" },\n    { \"name\": \"General\",    \"priceAmount\": 799.00, \"currency\": \"INR\", \"quota\": 800, \"tierType\": \"PAID\" }\n  ],\n  \"isRecurring\": false,\n  \"recurrenceRule\": null,\n  \"sourceSeatMapId\": null\n}\n```\n**Response `201`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"id\": 101,\n  \"venueId\": 42,\n  \"cityId\": 3,\n  \"title\": \"Rock Night 2026\",\n  \"startTime\": \"2026-04-15T19:00:00+05:30\",\n  \"endTime\": \"2026-04-15T23:00:00+05:30\",\n  \"seatingMode\": \"GA\",\n  \"capacity\": 1000,\n  \"status\": \"DRAFT\",\n  \"isRecurring\": false,\n  \"ebEventId\": null,\n  \"syncAttemptCount\": 0,\n  \"pricingTiers\": [ ... ],\n  \"createdAt\": \"2026-03-03T10:00:00Z\"\n}\n```\n**Response `409` — conflict detected:**\n```json\n{\n  \"errorCode\": \"SLOT_CONFLICT\",\n  \"message\": \"Venue has an overlapping slot or turnaround gap violation\",\n  \"alternatives\": {\n    \"sameVenueAlternatives\": [\n      { \"proposedStart\": \"2026-04-16T19:00:00+05:30\", \"proposedEnd\": \"2026-04-16T23:00:00+05:30\" }\n    ],\n    \"nearbyVenueAlternatives\": [\n      { \"venueId\": 43, \"venueName\": \"City Hall\", \"city\": \"Bengaluru\", \"capacity\": 800 }\n    ],\n    \"adjustedTimeOptions\": [\n      { \"proposedStart\": \"2026-04-15T20:30:00+05:30\", \"proposedEnd\": \"2026-04-16T00:30:00+05:30\" }\n    ]\n  }\n}\n```\n**Response `400`:** validation failure (end before start, no pricing tiers, unknown venueId)  \n**Response `502`:** venue fetch from `discovery-catalog` failed  \n\n---\n\n#### `POST /api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/submit`\n\nTransition slot `DRAFT → PENDING_SYNC`. Triggers the full EB sync chain (D.1 → D.2–D.5 → D.6).\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Path params:** `id` (Long)  \n**Request body:** none  \n**Response `200`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"id\": 101,\n  \"status\": \"PENDING_SYNC\",\n  \"ebEventId\": null,\n  \"syncAttemptCount\": 0,\n  \"message\": \"EB sync initiated\"\n}\n```\n**Response `404`:** slot not found  \n**Response `422`:** slot not in `DRAFT` status — `BusinessRuleException`  \n**Response `502`:** EB draft creation failed — slot stays `PENDING_SYNC`, `syncAttemptCount` incremented, `lastSyncError` recorded  \n**Notes:** Response is returned immediately after transitioning to `PENDING_SYNC`. EB sync proceeds asynchronously (Spring Events). `ebEventId` is populated once D.1 succeeds.\n\n---\n\n#### `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}`\n\nGet full slot details including current sync state.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Path params:** `id` (Long)  \n**Response `200`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"id\": 101,\n  \"venueId\": 42,\n  \"cityId\": 3,\n  \"title\": \"Rock Night 2026\",\n  \"startTime\": \"2026-04-15T19:00:00+05:30\",\n  \"endTime\": \"2026-04-15T23:00:00+05:30\",\n  \"seatingMode\": \"GA\",\n  \"capacity\": 1000,\n  \"status\": \"ACTIVE\",\n  \"isRecurring\": false,\n  \"ebEventId\": \"eb-event-556677\",\n  \"ebSeriesId\": null,\n  \"syncAttemptCount\": 0,\n  \"lastSyncError\": null,\n  \"lastAttemptedAt\": null,\n  \"pricingTiers\": [\n    { \"id\": 1, \"name\": \"Early Bird\", \"priceAmount\": 499.00, \"currency\": \"INR\", \"quota\": 200, \"tierType\": \"PAID\", \"ebTicketClassId\": \"tc-001\" },\n    { \"id\": 2, \"name\": \"General\",    \"priceAmount\": 799.00, \"currency\": \"INR\", \"quota\": 800, \"tierType\": \"PAID\", \"ebTicketClassId\": \"tc-002\" }\n  ],\n  \"createdAt\": \"2026-03-03T10:00:00Z\",\n  \"updatedAt\": \"2026-03-03T10:05:00Z\"\n}\n```\n**Response `404`:** slot not found  \n\n---\n\n#### `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots`\n\nList slots with filters.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Query params:** `orgId` (Long, required), `status` (ShowSlotStatus, optional), `venueId` (Long, optional), `cityId` (Long, optional), `startAfter` (ISO timestamp, optional), `page`, `size`  \n**Response `200`:** paginated list of `ShowSlotResponse`  \n\n---\n\n#### `PUT /api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}`\n\nUpdate a slot's details. If status is `ACTIVE`, triggers `EbEventSyncService.updateEvent()`. Internal update always persists regardless of EB outcome.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Path params:** `id` (Long)  \n**Request body:** partial — any subset of `title`, `description`, `startTime`, `endTime`, `capacity`, `pricingTiers`  \n**Response `200`:** updated `ShowSlotResponse`  \n**Response `404`:** slot not found  \n**Response `422`:** slot is `CANCELLED` — cannot update a terminal slot  \n**Response `502`:** EB update failed — internal update still persisted, `lastSyncError` recorded  \n\n---\n\n#### `POST /api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/cancel`\n\nCancel a slot. Transitions to `CANCELLED`, calls `EbEventSyncService.cancelEvent()`. EB failure does NOT block internal cancellation.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Path params:** `id` (Long)  \n**Request body:** `{ \"reason\": \"Venue unavailable\" }` (optional)  \n**Response `200`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"id\": 101,\n  \"status\": \"CANCELLED\",\n  \"ebCancelSynced\": true,\n  \"message\": \"Slot cancelled\"\n}\n```\n**Response `404`:** slot not found  \n**Response `422`:** slot already `CANCELLED`  \n**Notes:** If EB cancel fails, `ebCancelSynced: false` is returned but HTTP status is still `200` — internal cancellation succeeded. `lastSyncError` recorded for admin visibility.\n\n---\n\n#### `POST /api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/retry-sync`\n\n*(COULD)* Manually retry EB sync for a slot stuck in `PENDING_SYNC`.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Path params:** `id` (Long)  \n**Response `200`:** `{ \"status\": \"PENDING_SYNC\", \"message\": \"Retry initiated\" }`  \n**Response `422`:** slot not in `PENDING_SYNC`  \n\n---\n\n#### `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/occurrences`\n\nList all occurrences for a recurring slot.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Path params:** `id` (Long — parent slot ID)  \n**Response `200`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"slotId\": 101,\n  \"occurrences\": [\n    {\n      \"id\": 201,\n      \"occurrenceIndex\": 1,\n      \"startTime\": \"2026-04-15T19:00:00+05:30\",\n      \"endTime\": \"2026-04-15T23:00:00+05:30\",\n      \"status\": \"ACTIVE\",\n      \"ebEventId\": \"eb-occ-001\",\n      \"syncAttemptCount\": 0\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```\n**Response `404`:** slot not found  \n**Response `422`:** slot is not recurring (`isRecurring = false`)  \n\n---\n\n#### `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots/mismatches`\n\nList `ACTIVE` slots where EB event is missing or in unexpected state — flagged by `SlotReconciliationJob`.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Query params:** `orgId` (Long, required), `page`, `size`  \n**Response `200`:** paginated list of slots with `lastSyncError` populated  \n\n---\n\n### 4. Admin Dashboard Aggregations — `admin/` module\n\n> `admin/` owns no `@Entity`. These endpoints call `scheduling` and `discovery-catalog` REST APIs and aggregate the results. No business logic in `admin/`.\n\n---\n\n#### `GET /api/v1/admin/scheduling/slots/flagged`\n\nAggregates slots in `PENDING_SYNC` with `syncAttemptCount > 0`, or `ACTIVE` slots flagged by reconciliation.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Query params:** `orgId` (Long, required)  \n**Response `200`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"pendingSyncFailed\": [\n    { \"id\": 101, \"title\": \"Rock Night\", \"status\": \"PENDING_SYNC\", \"syncAttemptCount\": 3, \"lastSyncError\": \"EB publish timeout\", \"lastAttemptedAt\": \"...\" }\n  ],\n  \"activeWithEbMismatch\": [\n    { \"id\": 105, \"title\": \"Jazz Evening\", \"status\": \"ACTIVE\", \"ebEventId\": \"eb-999\", \"lastSyncError\": \"EB event not found on reconciliation\" }\n  ]\n}\n```\n**Notes:** Delegates to `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots?status=PENDING_SYNC&orgId=...` and `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots/mismatches`. Aggregated in `OrgDashboardService` in `admin/`.\n\n---\n\n#### `GET /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged`\n\nAggregates venues with `syncStatus = DRIFT_FLAGGED`.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Query params:** `orgId` (Long, required)  \n**Response `200`:** paginated list of flagged `VenueResponse` with `lastSyncError`  \n**Notes:** Delegates to `GET /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` in `discovery-catalog`.\n\n---\n\n### Internal REST Calls (module-to-module — not public API)\n\nThese are intra-service calls that reuse existing public endpoints — no new endpoints needed.\n\n| Caller | Callee | Endpoint reused | Purpose |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `scheduling` | `discovery-catalog` | `GET /api/v1/catalog/venues/{id}` | Fetch venue capacity + seatingMode before conflict check |\n| `scheduling` | `discovery-catalog` | `GET /api/v1/catalog/venues?cityId={id}&orgId={id}` | Fetch nearby venues for conflict alternative suggestions |\n| `admin/` | `scheduling` | `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots?status=PENDING_SYNC` | Aggregate flagged slot data for dashboard |\n| `admin/` | `scheduling` | `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots/mismatches` | Aggregate EB mismatch data for dashboard |\n| `admin/` | `discovery-catalog` | `GET /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` | Aggregate drift-flagged venues for dashboard |\n\n---\n\n### Endpoint Summary\n\n| # | Method | Path | Module | Auth |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| 1 | POST | `/api/v1/admin/orgs/{orgId}/eventbrite/connect` | admin | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 2 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/orgs/{orgId}/eventbrite/callback` | admin | none (state guard) |\n| 3 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/orgs/{orgId}/eventbrite/status` | admin | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 4 | DELETE | `/api/v1/admin/orgs/{orgId}/eventbrite/disconnect` | admin | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 5 | POST | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues` | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 6 | PUT | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/{id}` | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 7 | GET | `/api/v1/catalog/venues/{id}` | discovery-catalog | none |\n| 8 | POST | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/{id}/sync` *(COULD)* | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 9 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 10 | POST | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 11 | POST | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/submit` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 12 | GET | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 13 | GET | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 14 | PUT | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 15 | POST | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/cancel` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 16 | POST | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/retry-sync` *(COULD)* | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 17 | GET | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/occurrences` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 18 | GET | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/mismatches` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 19 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/scheduling/slots/flagged` | admin | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 20 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` *(agg.)* | admin | ROLE_ADMIN |\n\n\n---\n\n## Stage 6 — Business Logic\n\n> Rules presented in the order that code executes. Where a rule parallels Flow 1 (SPEC_1.md Stage 6), the relationship is called out explicitly.\n\n---\n\n### 1. Org Context Resolution\n\nAll Flow 2 endpoints are admin-only (`ROLE_ADMIN`). `org_id` is resolved from the authenticated principal:\n\n- **Admin reads / writes** → `org_id` extracted from JWT claim `orgId`.\n- Never imported from `identity` `@Service` (Hard Rule #1). The JWT itself carries the claim.\n- Every ACL facade call (`EbVenueService`, `EbEventSyncService`, etc.) receives `orgId` as a parameter and resolves the token via `EbTokenStore.getToken(orgId)`.\n- If no `OrganizationAuth` row exists for `orgId`, or status is `REVOKED`, `EbTokenStore` throws `EbAuthException` immediately — the EB call never starts.\n\n> Contrast with Flow 1 (SPEC_1 §6.1): public catalog reads resolve `org_id` from `app.default-org-id` config. Flow 2 admin endpoints always resolve from JWT.\n\n"
  }
}
```

No business logic in `admin/`.\n\n---\n\n#### `GET /api/v1/admin/scheduling/slots/flagged`\n\nAggregates slots in `PENDING_SYNC` with `syncAttemptCount > 0`, or `ACTIVE` slots flagged by reconciliation.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Query params:** `orgId` (Long, required)  \n**Response `200`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"pendingSyncFailed\": [\n    { \"id\": 101, \"title\": \"Rock Night\", \"status\": \"PENDING_SYNC\", \"syncAttemptCount\": 3, \"lastSyncError\": \"EB publish timeout\", \"lastAttemptedAt\": \"...\" }\n  ],\n  \"activeWithEbMismatch\": [\n    { \"id\": 105, \"title\": \"Jazz Evening\", \"status\": \"ACTIVE\", \"ebEventId\": \"eb-999\", \"lastSyncError\": \"EB event not found on reconciliation\" }\n  ]\n}\n```\n**Notes:** Delegates to `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots?status=PENDING_SYNC&orgId=...` and `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots/mismatches`. Aggregated in `OrgDashboardService` in `admin/`.\n\n---\n\n#### `GET /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged`\n\nAggregates venues with `syncStatus = DRIFT_FLAGGED`.\n\n**Auth:** `ROLE_ADMIN`  \n**Query params:** `orgId` (Long, required)  \n**Response `200`:** paginated list of flagged `VenueResponse` with `lastSyncError`  \n**Notes:** Delegates to `GET /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` in `discovery-catalog`.\n\n---\n\n### Internal REST Calls (module-to-module — not public API)\n\nThese are intra-service calls that reuse existing public endpoints — no new endpoints needed.\n\n| Caller | Callee | Endpoint reused | Purpose |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `scheduling` | `discovery-catalog` | `GET /api/v1/catalog/venues/{id}` | Fetch venue capacity + seatingMode before conflict check |\n| `scheduling` | `discovery-catalog` | `GET /api/v1/catalog/venues?cityId={id}&orgId={id}` | Fetch nearby venues for conflict alternative suggestions |\n| `admin/` | `scheduling` | `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots?status=PENDING_SYNC` | Aggregate flagged slot data for dashboard |\n| `admin/` | `scheduling` | `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots/mismatches` | Aggregate EB mismatch data for dashboard |\n| `admin/` | `discovery-catalog` | `GET /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` | Aggregate drift-flagged venues for dashboard |\n\n---\n\n### Endpoint Summary\n\n| # | Method | Path | Module | Auth |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| 1 | POST | `/api/v1/admin/orgs/{orgId}/eventbrite/connect` | admin | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 2 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/orgs/{orgId}/eventbrite/callback` | admin | none (state guard) |\n| 3 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/orgs/{orgId}/eventbrite/status` | admin | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 4 | DELETE | `/api/v1/admin/orgs/{orgId}/eventbrite/disconnect` | admin | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 5 | POST | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues` | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 6 | PUT | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/{id}` | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 7 | GET | `/api/v1/catalog/venues/{id}` | discovery-catalog | none |\n| 8 | POST | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/{id}/sync` *(COULD)* | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 9 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 10 | POST | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 11 | POST | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/submit` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 12 | GET | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 13 | GET | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 14 | PUT | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 15 | POST | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/cancel` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 16 | POST | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/retry-sync` *(COULD)* | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 17 | GET | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/occurrences` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 18 | GET | `/api/v1/scheduling/slots/mismatches` | scheduling | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 19 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/scheduling/slots/flagged` | admin | ROLE_ADMIN |\n| 20 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` *(agg.)* | admin | ROLE_ADMIN |\n\n\n---\n\n## Stage 6 — Business Logic\n\n> Rules presented in the order that code executes. Where a rule parallels Flow 1 (SPEC_1.md Stage 6), the relationship is called out explicitly.\n\n---\n\n### 1. Org Context Resolution\n\nAll Flow 2 endpoints are admin-only (`ROLE_ADMIN`). `org_id` is resolved from the authenticated principal:\n\n- **Admin reads / writes** → `org_id` extracted from JWT claim `orgId`.\n- Never imported from `identity` `@Service` (Hard Rule #1). The JWT itself carries the claim.\n- Every ACL facade call (`EbVenueService`, `EbEventSyncService`, etc.) receives `orgId` as a parameter and resolves the token via `EbTokenStore.getToken(orgId)`.\n- If no `OrganizationAuth` row exists for `orgId`, or status is `REVOKED`, `EbTokenStore` throws `EbAuthException` immediately — the EB call never starts.\n\n> Contrast with Flow 1 (SPEC_1 §6.1): public catalog reads resolve `org_id` from `app.default-org-id` config. Flow 2 admin endpoints always resolve from JWT.\n\n"
```json
  }
}
```

```json
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
```
```json
    "text": "**Deciding internal REST client approach**\n\nConsidering adding new DTOs and dependencies for calling discovery-catalog from scheduling service using Spring RestClient, but avoiding direct repository or service calls as per spec. Planning to create a RestClient bean configured with a base URL from a property like `app.internal-base-url` or fallback to localhost with port 8080 since there's no existing property for this."
  }
}
```

No application module (`scheduling`, `discovery-catalog`, `booking-inventory`, etc.) stores or caches EB tokens directly.\n28:### B. Venue Management *(discovery-catalog owns this)*\n31:- **[MUST]** On venue creation, `discovery-catalog` must call `EbVenueService.createVenue(orgToken, venueData)` → `POST /organizations/{eb_org_id}/venues/`.\n33:- **[MUST]** `scheduling` must read venue data via REST call to `discovery-catalog` only — never direct DB import, never shared entity.\n34:- **[MUST]** When admin updates a venue, `discovery-catalog` must call `EbVenueService.updateVenue(orgToken, ebVenueId, venueData)` → `POST /venues/{venue_id}/`.\n35:- **[SHOULD]** A periodic `VenueReconciliationJob` in `discovery-catalog` must call `GET /venues/{eb_venue_id}/` for each venue and flag external drift (capacity/address change on EB side) for admin review.\n36:- **[COULD]** Admin must be able to manually trigger venue re-sync via `POST /api/discovery-catalog/venues/{id}/sync`.\n43:- **[MUST]** `scheduling` must retrieve venue details (capacity, seating mode, city) via REST GET to `discovery-catalog` before validation. It must not store a copy of the venue entity.\n48:  - Alternative venues in the same city (query `discovery-catalog` REST by `city_id`, sorted by capacity match)\n144:- **[MUST]** `discovery-catalog/service/VenueReconciliationJob` (`@Scheduled`) must call `GET /venues/{eb_venue_id}/` for each venue and flag external edits (address, capacity drift) for admin review.\n145:- **[MUST]** `admin/` reads flagged mismatches for dashboard display via REST GET calls to `scheduling` and `discovery-catalog`. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no reconciliation logic.\n171:| `Venue` | `discovery-catalog` | `@Entity` |  Yes |\n217:### 2. `Venue` — `discovery-catalog/domain/`\n219:Represents a physical performance venue. venue.\n386:                         Venue (discovery-catalog)         ShowSlot (scheduling)\n409:| `VenueSyncStatus` | `PENDING_SYNC`, `SYNCED`, `DRIFT_FLAGGED` | `discovery-catalog/` |\n423:| Venue Venue Management — `discovery-catalog` module\n1185:**Response `502`:** venue fetch from `discovery-catalog` failed  \n1346:> `admin/` owns no `@Entity`. These endpoints call `scheduling` and `discovery-catalog` REST APIs and aggregate the results. No business logic in `admin/`.\n1378:**Notes:** Delegates to `GET /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` in `discovery-catalog`.\n1388:| `scheduling` | `discovery-catalog` | `GET /api/v1/catalog/venues/{id}` | Fetch venue capacity + seatingMode before conflict check |\n1389:| `scheduling` | `discovery-catalog` | `GET /api/v1/catalog/venues?cityId={id}&orgId={id}` | Fetch nearby venues for conflict alternative suggestions |\n1392:| `admin/` | `discovery-catalog` | `GET /api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` | Aggregate drift-flagged venues for dashboard |\n1404:| 5 | POST | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues` | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n1405:| 6 | PUT | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/{id}` | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n1406:| 7 | GET | `/api/v1/catalog/venues/{id}` | discovery-catalog | none |\n1407:| 8 | POST | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/{id}/sync` *(COULD)* | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n1408:| 9 | GET | `/api/v1/admin/catalog/venues/flagged` | discovery-catalog | ROLE_ADMIN |\n1503:**Owner:** `discovery-catalog` → `VenueService.createVenue(orgId, request)`\n1532:**Owner:** `discovery-catalog` → `VenueService.updateVenue(orgId, venueId, request)`\n1589:1. Fetch venue details via REST GET to discovery-catalog:\n1610:**Note on venue REST call:** `scheduling` calls `discovery-catalog` via internal HTTP (same JVM, same process — Spring MVC dispatch-to-self or explicit `RestTemplate`/`WebClient` call depending on config). It receives a `VenueDto` value object. It NEVER holds a reference to `Venue.java` from `discovery-catalog`.\n1674:> This REST call to `discovery-catalog` is the only cross-module call in conflict detection. It follows Hard Rule #1 — `scheduling` does NOT import `Venue.java` or `VenueRepository`.\n1826:**Owner:** `discovery-catalog` → `SlotActivatedListener.onSlotActivated(event)`\n1910:**Owner:** `discovery-catalog` → `SlotCancelledListener.onSlotCancelled(event)`\n2072:| `WebhookConfig.consecutiveFailures` | `discovery-catalog` (Flow 1) | Tracks EB catalog sync / webhook delivery failures. Drives `cooldown_until` on the org. |\n2087:│   └── CatalogNotFoundException          ← from Flow 1 (venue not found in discovery-catalog)\n2155:- `VenueService` (discovery-catalog): venue not found by `venueId` → `CatalogNotFoundException(\"Venue not found: \" + venueId)` *(reused from Flow 1)*\n2157:- `scheduling` REST call to `discovery-catalog` returns 404 → propagated as `SchedulingNotFoundException(\"Venue not found via catalog: \" + venueId)`\n2412:**No exception thrown to admin.** `ShowSlotCancelledEvent` is still published — `SlotCancelledListener` in `discovery-catalog` still updates `event_catalog.state` and invalidates cache regardless of EB cancel outcome.\n2420:**Applies to:** `SlotReconciliationJob` (scheduling) and `VenueReconciliationJob` (discovery-catalog).\n2603:Tests live in: `scheduling/src/test/java/.../scheduling/service/`, `discovery-catalog/src/test/java/.../discoverycatalog/service/`\n2723:#### `VenueServiceTest` — `discovery-catalog`\n2739:#### `SlotActivatedListenerTest` — `discovery-catalog`\n2750:#### `SlotCancelledListenerTest` — `discovery-catalog`\n2775:#### `VenueReconciliationJobTest` — `discovery-catalog`\n2909:#### `VenueCatalogControllerTest` — `discovery-catalog`\n2988:> **Flow 1 rules (SPEC_1 Stage 8 ArchUnit) remain in force.** Rules 1, 2, 5, 6, 10 are already tested in `discovery-catalog/arch/`. The tests below are additive — new rules and new modules.\n3050:#### `DiscoveryCatalogArchTest` (additions) — `discovery-catalog/src/test/java/.../discoverycatalog/arch/`\n3099:#### `VenueMapperTest` (additions) — `discovery-catalog`\n3114:| `discovery-catalog` (additions) | ≥ 90% | ≥ 85% | ≥ 80% | 100% (build breaks) |\n"
```json
  }

Fetch venue details via REST GET to discovery-catalog:\n1610:**Note on venue REST call:** `scheduling` calls `discovery-catalog` via internal HTTP (same JVM, same process — Spring MVC dispatch-to-self or explicit `RestTemplate`/`WebClient` call depending on config). It receives a `VenueDto` value object. It NEVER holds a reference to `Venue.java` from `discovery-catalog`.\n1674:> This REST call to `discovery-catalog` is the only cross-module call in conflict detection. It follows Hard Rule #1 — `scheduling` does NOT import `Venue.java` or `VenueRepository`.\n1826:**Owner:** `discovery-catalog` → `SlotActivatedListener.onSlotActivated(event)`\n1910:**Owner:** `discovery-catalog` → `SlotCancelledListener.onSlotCancelled(event)`\n2072:| `WebhookConfig.consecutiveFailures` | `discovery-catalog` (Flow 1) | Tracks EB catalog sync / webhook delivery failures. Drives `cooldown_until` on the org. |\n2087:│   └── CatalogNotFoundException          ← from Flow 1 (venue not found in discovery-catalog)\n2155:- `VenueService` (discovery-catalog): venue not found by `venueId` → `CatalogNotFoundException(\"Venue not found: \" + venueId)` *(reused from Flow 1)*\n2157:- `scheduling` REST call to `discovery-catalog` returns 404 → propagated as `SchedulingNotFoundException(\"Venue not found via catalog: \" + venueId)`\n2412:**No exception thrown to admin.** `ShowSlotCancelledEvent` is still published — `SlotCancelledListener` in `discovery-catalog` still updates `event_catalog.state` and invalidates cache regardless of EB cancel outcome.\n2420:**Applies to:** `SlotReconciliationJob` (scheduling) and `VenueReconciliationJob` (discovery-catalog).\n2603:Tests live in: `scheduling/src/test/java/.../scheduling/service/`, `discovery-catalog/src/test/java/.../discoverycatalog/service/`\n2723:#### `VenueServiceTest` — `discovery-catalog`\n2739:#### `SlotActivatedListenerTest` — `discovery-catalog`\n2750:#### `SlotCancelledListenerTest` — `discovery-catalog`\n2775:#### `VenueReconciliationJobTest` — `discovery-catalog`\n2909:#### `VenueCatalogControllerTest` — `discovery-catalog`\n2988:> **Flow 1 rules (SPEC_1 Stage 8 ArchUnit) remain in force.** Rules 1, 2, 5, 6, 10 are already tested in `discovery-catalog/arch/`. The tests below are additive — new rules and new modules.\n3050:#### `DiscoveryCatalogArchTest` (additions) — `discovery-catalog/src/test/java/.../discoverycatalog/arch/`\n3099:#### `VenueMapperTest` (additions) — `discovery-catalog`\n3114:| `discovery-catalog` (additions) | ≥ 90% | ≥ 85% | ≥ 80% | 100% (build breaks) |\n"
  }
```
```json
}
```

## Entry 171
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:51:47.097Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:51:47.097Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Clarifying module dependencies and DTO handling**\n\nI'm deciding that the scheduling module won't depend on discovery-catalog directly to respect boundaries and will use local DTO records with REST calls and JSON parsing instead. Booking-inventory needs to depend on scheduling for event classes, but this conflicts with the existing module dependency order, so module relations may need adjustment."
  }
}
```

## Entry 172
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:51:47.106Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:51:47.106Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Resolving module dependency conflicts by placing event classes in shared**\n\nI concluded that to avoid circular dependencies, event classes must live in the shared module despite the spec saying scheduling, so booking-inventory and discovery-catalog can depend on shared for events safely. Scheduling will use local DTOs and REST calls without depending on discovery-catalog module, removing cycles and aligning with hard dependency rules."
  }
}
```

## Entry 196
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:52:01.312Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:52:01.312Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_wq1otK764p89RA6m4fENoKyT",
    "output": "Chunk ID: b90475\nWall time: 0.0507 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 380\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception;\n\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ExceptionHandler;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestControllerAdvice;\n\n@RestControllerAdvice\npublic class GlobalExceptionHandler {\n\n    @ExceptionHandler(BaseException.class)\n    public ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleBaseException(BaseException ex) {\n        ErrorResponse response = new ErrorResponse(\n            ex.getErrorCode(),\n            ex.getMessage(),\n            ex.getHttpStatus().value(),\n            Instant.now()\n        );\n        return ResponseEntity.status(ex.getHttpStatus()).body(response);\n    }\n\n    @ExceptionHandler(MethodArgumentNotValidException.class)\n    public ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleValidation(MethodArgumentNotValidException ex) {\n        ErrorResponse response = new ErrorResponse(\n            \"VALIDATION_ERROR\",\n            ex.getMessage(),\n            400,\n            Instant.now()\n        );\n        return ResponseEntity.badRequest().body(response);\n    }\n\n    @ExceptionHandler(Exception.class)\n    public ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleUnexpected(Exception ex) {\n        ErrorResponse response = new ErrorResponse(\n            \"INTERNAL_ERROR\",\n            ex.getMessage(),\n            500,\n            Instant.now()\n        );\n        return ResponseEntity.status(500).body(response);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

```json
{

  "payload": {
```
```json
    "type": "function_call",
```
```json
    "name": "update_plan",
    "arguments": "{\"explanation\":\"Implement SPEC_2 across shared, discovery-catalog, new scheduling/booking-inventory/admin modules, plus migrations and poms.\",\"plan\":[{\"step\":\"Review existing code and spec details needed for DTOs, endpoints, and state transitions\",\"status\":\"completed\"},{\"step\":\"Update shared module (enums, exceptions, OrganizationAuth token store, EB facades, retry policy, DTOs, Roles)\",\"status\":\"in_progress\"},{\"step\":\"Update discovery-catalog (Venue fields, DTOs, mapper, services, controllers, reconciliation job, listeners) and add migrations V5\",\"status\":\"pending\"},{\"step\":\"Add scheduling module (entities, repositories, mapper, services, state machine, controllers, events, reconciliation job) and migrations V7-V9\",\"status\":\"pending\"},{\"step\":\"Add booking-inventory module (event listener + ticket sync service)\",\"status\":\"pending\"},{\"step\":\"Add admin module (OAuth endpoints + dashboard aggregation) and update root/app configs and poms\",\"status\":\"pending\"}]}",
    "call_id": "call_sBNf8tOkIkFQxuRHTOE6kxfq"
  }
}
```

## Entry 223

**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:53:08.008Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Planning RestClient and encryption setup**\n\nI'm deciding to add RestClient initialization directly in the scheduler using builder with base URL from properties, avoiding a shared bean for now. For Eventbrite tokens, I'll create a JPA entity for organization auth and implement AES-GCM encryption in a new TokenCipher service using a base64 key from config."
  }
}
```

## Entry 224
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:53:08.011Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:53:08.011Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Designing token store and Eventbrite service interfaces**\n\nI've drafted the TokenCipher with AES-GCM encryption and mapped out the OrganizationAuth entity with encrypted tokens and status. The EbTokenStore will handle token retrieval, refresh logic, and OAuth code exchange via an EbOAuthClient interface that defaults to throwing integration exceptions, allowing stubbing or mocking. Also planning placeholder Eventbrite venue service interfaces that throw by default since no client exists yet."
  }
}
```

```json
        "text": "**Planning RestClient and encryption setup**\n\nI'm deciding to add RestClient initialization directly in the scheduler using builder with base URL from properties, avoiding a shared bean for now.         "type": "summary_text",
```

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:53:25.759Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Planning adding facade stubs and retry policy**\n\nI'll add minimal facade interfaces and default stub implementations for needed services in shared (EbTicketService, EbCapacityService, EbScheduleService, EbVenueService) throwing exceptions by default. For retry logic, the spec wants usage of Spring's @Retryable, but since spring-retry isn't a current dependency, I'll consider whether to add it or provide a simpler alternative without it."
  }
}
```

```json
    "text": "**Planning adding facade stubs and retry policy**\n\nI'll add minimal facade interfaces and default stub implementations for needed services in shared (EbTicketService, EbCapacityService, EbScheduleService, EbVenueService) throwing exceptions by default. }
```

## Entry 246
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:54:12.069Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:54:12.069Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Reconciling address fields with existing model**\n\nThe existing venue table uses a single address field, but the spec expects separate addressLine1, addressLine2, and country fields. Since no DB migration adds these fields, the plan is to accept them in requests, combine addressLine1 and addressLine2 into the existing address field for storage, and ignore country or consider storing it within the address string temporarily."
  }
}
```

## Entry 247
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:54:12.093Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:54:12.093Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Considering schema extension for address fields**\n\nGiven the spec's Stage 2 venue fields include address_line1, address_line2, and country but the existing migrations don't add them, adding these columns in the current V5 migration would diverge from spec but better support the model. The plan leans toward extending the schema with new address fields for proper storage while keeping existing columns for backward compatibility, though this adds complexity and requires updating the entity accordingly."
  }
}
```

```json
        "type": "summary_text",
        "text": "**Reconciling address fields with existing model**\n\nThe existing venue table uses a single address field, but the spec expects separate addressLine1, addressLine2, and country fields. Since no DB migration adds these fields, the plan is to accept them in requests, combine addressLine1 and addressLine2 into the existing address field for storage, and ignore country or consider storing it within the address string temporarily."
      },
      {
        "type": "summary_text",
        "text": "**Considering schema extension for address fields**\n\nGiven the spec's Stage 2 venue fields include address_line1, address_line2, and country but the existing migrations don't add them, adding these columns in the current V5 migration would diverge from spec but better support the model. The plan leans toward extending the schema with new address fields for proper storage while keeping existing columns for backward compatibility, though this adds complexity and requires updating the entity accordingly."
      }
    ],
```

## Entry 252

**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:55:19.489Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Deciding on JPA embedding for Money record**\n\nConsidering adding `@Embeddable` to the Money record in shared, accepting the JPA dependency there, then embedding Money in ShowSlotPricingTier with `@Embedded` plus attribute overrides to map amount and currency columns accordingly."
  }
}
```

## Entry 253
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:55:19.491Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:55:19.491Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Planning ShowSlot state machine and conflict handling**\n\nDecided to implement a lightweight custom state machine using enums and simple guard/action classes without adding Spring StateMachine dependency, aligning with spec structure but avoiding heavy libs. For conflict handling, service will throw `SlotConflictException` carrying alternatives, with controllers catching it to return a custom 409 response including alternatives, since global exception handling can’t depend on scheduling-specific DTOs. Also planning conflict detection service querying overlapping slots and nearby venues via REST client with local DTOs to avoid cross-module dependencies."
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**
```json
{
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Planning ShowSlot state machine and conflict handling**\n\nDecided to implement a lightweight custom state machine using enums and simple guard/action classes without adding Spring StateMachine dependency, aligning with spec structure but avoiding heavy libs. For conflict handling, service will throw `SlotConflictException` carrying alternatives, with controllers catching it to return a custom 409 response including alternatives, since global exception handling can’t depend on scheduling-specific DTOs. Also planning conflict detection service querying overlapping slots and nearby venues via REST client with local DTOs to avoid cross-module dependencies."
  }
}
```
---

```json
        "text": "**Deciding on JPA embedding for Money record**\n\nConsidering adding `@Embeddable` to the Money record in shared, accepting the JPA dependency there, then embedding Money in ShowSlotPricingTier with `@Embedded` plus attribute overrides to map amount and currency columns accordingly."
      },
      {
        "type": "summary_text",
        "text": "**Planning ShowSlot state machine and conflict handling**\n\nDecided to implement a lightweight custom state machine using enums and simple guard/action classes without adding Spring StateMachine dependency, aligning with spec structure but avoiding heavy libs. For conflict handling, service will throw `SlotConflictException` carrying alternatives, with controllers catching it to return a custom 409 response including alternatives, since global exception handling can’t depend on scheduling-specific DTOs. Also planning conflict detection service querying overlapping slots and nearby venues via REST client with local DTOs to avoid cross-module dependencies."
      }
    ],
```

```json
{

      {
        "type": "summary_text",
        "text": "**Deciding on JPA embedding for Money record**\n\nConsidering adding `@Embeddable` to the Money record in shared, accepting the JPA dependency there, then embedding Money in ShowSlotPricingTier with `@Embedded` plus attribute overrides to map amount and currency columns accordingly."
      },
      {
        "type": "summary_text",
        "text": "**Planning ShowSlot state machine and conflict handling**\n\nDecided to implement a lightweight custom state machine using enums and simple guard/action classes without adding Spring StateMachine dependency, aligning with spec structure but avoiding heavy libs. For conflict handling, service will throw `SlotConflictException` carrying alternatives, with controllers catching it to return a custom 409 response including alternatives, since global exception handling can’t depend on scheduling-specific DTOs. Also planning conflict detection service querying overlapping slots and nearby venues via REST client with local DTOs to avoid cross-module dependencies."
      }
    ],

alternatives.\n1885:- `SlotConflictException` will never reference a CANCELLED slot (conflict query excludes `CANCELLED`).\n2085:├── ResourceNotFoundException (404)       ← from Flow 1\n2086:│   └── `SLOT_NOT_FOUND` / `VENUE_NOT_FOUND` |\n2153:- `ShowSlotService`: slot not found by `slotId` → `SchedulingNotFoundException(\"Slot not found: \" + slotId)`\n2154:- `ShowSlotService`: occurrence not found → `SchedulingNotFoundException(\"Occurrence not found: \" + occurrenceId)`\n2155:- `VenueService` (discovery-catalog): venue not found by `venueId` → `CatalogNotFoundException(\"Venue not found: \" + venueId)` *(reused from Flow 1)*\n2156:- `OrgOAuthService` / `EbTokenStore`: no `OrganizationAuth` row for `orgId` → `SchedulingNotFoundException(\"No EB auth configured for org: \" + orgId)` *(before attempting EB connection)*\n2157:- `scheduling` REST call to `discovery-catalog` returns 404 → propagated as `SchedulingNotFoundException(\"Venue not found via catalog: \" + venueId)`\n2167:> **Flow 1 alignment:** `CatalogNotFoundException` is already defined and mapped in `GlobalExceptionHandler`. `SchedulingNotFoundException` is a new peer class extending the same `ResourceNotFoundException`. No change to the handler dispatch logic — just a new subclass registered.\n2175:**Exception:** `SlotConflictException(ConflictAlternativeResponse alternatives)` extends `BusinessRuleException`.\n2196:**GlobalExceptionHandler rule:** Catch `SlotConflictException` → 422 → serialize `exception.getAlternatives()` into `alternatives` field on the `ErrorResponse`.\n2494:| Slot / venue / org not found | 404 | `SchedulingNotFoundException` / `CatalogNotFoundException` |\n2495:| Slot conflict detected | 422 | `SlotConflictException` → `ErrorResponse` with `alternatives` |\n2615:should_throw_SchedulingNotFoundException_when_venue_not_found_via_rest_call\n2617:should_throw_SlotConflictException_with_alternatives_when_overlap_detected\n2618:should_throw_SlotConflictException_with_alternatives_when_gap_policy_violated\n2734:should_throw_CatalogNotFoundException_when_venue_not_found_by_id\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 264

**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:55:38.865Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Designing exception details handling**\n\nPlanning to add an optional `details` field to BaseException and ErrorResponse to allow exceptions like SlotConflictException to carry extra info without creating cross-module dependencies. This involves updating constructors in BaseException and its subclasses and modifying GlobalExceptionHandler to include these details in responses."
  }
}
```

**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:55:59.625Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Finalizing exception usage and security setup**\n\nConfirming SchedulingNotFoundException for scheduling slots, OrganizationAuthNotFoundException for shared org auth, and CatalogNotFoundException for discovery-catalog. Planning to implement scheduling’s REST endpoints with `@PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('ADMIN')\")`, adding Roles constants in shared/security and enabling method security in configuration. Preparing to update module POMs with necessary Spring Boot dependencies (spring-boot-starter-web, data-jpa, security) following existing module patterns and adding new modules to the root and app POMs."
  }
}
```

```json
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",

    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/common/exception/BaseException.java\n@@\n public abstract class BaseException extends RuntimeException {\n     private final String errorCode;\n     private final HttpStatus httpStatus;\n+    private final Object details;\n \n     protected BaseException(String message, String errorCode, HttpStatus httpStatus) {\n-        super(message);\n-        this.errorCode = errorCode;\n-        this.httpStatus = httpStatus;\n+        this(message, errorCode, httpStatus, null);\n     }\n \n+    protected BaseException(String message, String errorCode, HttpStatus httpStatus, Object details) {\n+        super(message);\n+        this.errorCode = errorCode;\n+        this.httpStatus = httpStatus;\n+        this.details = details;\n+    }\n+\n@@\n     public HttpStatus getHttpStatus() {\n         return httpStatus;\n     }\n+\n+    public Object getDetails() {\n+        return details;\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

```json
{
```

```json
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/domain/OrganizationAuth.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.BaseEntity;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Column;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Entity;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.EnumType;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Enumerated;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Table;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\n\\n@Entity\\n@Table(name = \\\"organization_auth\\\")\\npublic class OrganizationAuth extends BaseEntity {\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"organization_id\\\", nullable = false, unique = true)\\n    private Long organizationId;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"eb_organization_id\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private String ebOrganizationId;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"access_token_encrypted\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private String accessTokenEncrypted;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"refresh_token_encrypted\\\")\\n    private String refreshTokenEncrypted;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"expires_at\\\")\\n    private Instant expiresAt;\\n\\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\\n    @Column(name = \\\"status\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private OrgAuthStatus status;\\n\\n    protected OrganizationAuth() {\\n    }\\n\\n    public OrganizationAuth(Long organizationId, String ebOrganizationId, String accessTokenEncrypted) {\\n        this.organizationId = organizationId;\\n        this.ebOrganizationId = ebOrganizationId;\\n        this.accessTokenEncrypted = accessTokenEncrypted;\\n        this.status = OrgAuthStatus.PENDING;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Long getOrganizationId() {\\n        return organizationId;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String getEbOrganizationId() {\\n        return ebOrganizationId;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String getAccessTokenEncrypted() {\\n        return accessTokenEncrypted;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String getRefreshTokenEncrypted() {\\n        return refreshTokenEncrypted;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Instant getExpiresAt() {\\n        return expiresAt;\\n    }\\n\\n    public OrgAuthStatus getStatus() {\\n        return status;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markConnected(String accessTokenEncrypted, String refreshTokenEncrypted, Instant expiresAt) {\\n        this.accessTokenEncrypted = accessTokenEncrypted;\\n        this.refreshTokenEncrypted = refreshTokenEncrypted;\\n        this.expiresAt = expiresAt;\\n        this.status = OrgAuthStatus.CONNECTED;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markTokenExpired() {\\n        this.status = OrgAuthStatus.TOKEN_EXPIRED;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markRevoked() {\\n        this.status = OrgAuthStatus.REVOKED;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void updateTokens(String accessTokenEncrypted, String refreshTokenEncrypted, Instant expiresAt) {\\n        this.accessTokenEncrypted = accessTokenEncrypted;\\n        if (refreshTokenEncrypted != null) {\\n            this.refreshTokenEncrypted = refreshTokenEncrypted;\\n        }\\n        this.expiresAt = expiresAt;\\n        this.status = OrgAuthStatus.CONNECTED;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
```
```json
    "call_id": "call_vb7bC0lk5hrtqNovJ82gMF0A"
  }
}
```

## Entry 345
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:57:27.932Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:57:27.932Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/TokenCipher.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport java.nio.ByteBuffer;\\nimport java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;\\nimport java.security.SecureRandom;\\nimport java.util.Base64;\\nimport javax.crypto.Cipher;\\nimport javax.crypto.SecretKey;\\nimport javax.crypto.spec.GCMParameterSpec;\\nimport javax.crypto.spec.SecretKeySpec;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class TokenCipher {\\n    private static final String ALGO = \\\"AES\\\";\\n    private static final String TRANSFORMATION = \\\"AES/GCM/NoPadding\\\";\\n    private static final int IV_LENGTH = 12;\\n    private static final int TAG_LENGTH = 128;\\n\\n    private final SecretKey secretKey;\\n    private final SecureRandom secureRandom = new SecureRandom();\\n\\n    public TokenCipher(@Value(\\\"${eventbrite.oauth.encryption-key}\\\") String base64Key) {\\n        byte[] keyBytes = Base64.getDecoder().decode(base64Key);\\n        this.secretKey = new SecretKeySpec(keyBytes, ALGO);\\n    }\\n\\n    public String encrypt(String plaintext) {\\n        if (plaintext == null) {\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n        try {\\n            byte[] iv = new byte[IV_LENGTH];\\n            secureRandom.nextBytes(iv);\\n            Cipher cipher = Cipher.getInstance(TRANSFORMATION);\\n            cipher.init(Cipher.ENCRYPT_MODE, secretKey, new GCMParameterSpec(TAG_LENGTH, iv));\\n            byte[] encrypted = cipher.doFinal(plaintext.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));\\n            ByteBuffer buffer = ByteBuffer.allocate(iv.length + encrypted.length);\\n            buffer.put(iv);\\n            buffer.put(encrypted);\\n            return Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(buffer.array());\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"Failed to encrypt token\\\", ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    public String decrypt(String ciphertext) {\\n        if (ciphertext == null) {\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n        try {\\n            byte[] decoded = Base64.getDecoder().decode(ciphertext);\\n            ByteBuffer buffer = ByteBuffer.wrap(decoded);\\n            byte[] iv = new byte[IV_LENGTH];\\n            buffer.get(iv);\\n            byte[] encrypted = new byte[buffer.remaining()];\\n            buffer.get(encrypted);\\n            Cipher cipher = Cipher.getInstance(TRANSFORMATION);\\n            cipher.init(Cipher.DECRYPT_MODE, secretKey, new GCMParameterSpec(TAG_LENGTH, iv));\\n            byte[] decrypted = cipher.doFinal(encrypted);\\n            return new String(decrypted, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"Failed to decrypt token\\\", ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_HbRbS0HErwyN3d0YNYilR4Zc"
  }
}
```

java.nio.ByteBuffer;\\nimport java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;\\nimport java.security.SecureRandom;\\nimport java.util.Base64;\\nimport javax.crypto.Cipher;\\nimport javax.crypto.SecretKey;\\nimport javax.crypto.spec.GCMParameterSpec;\\nimport javax.crypto.spec.SecretKeySpec;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class TokenCipher {\\n    private static final String ALGO = \\\"AES\\\";\\n    private static final String TRANSFORMATION = \\\"AES/GCM/NoPadding\\\";\\n    private static final int IV_LENGTH = 12;\\n    private static final int TAG_LENGTH = 128;\\n\\n    private final SecretKey secretKey;\\n    private final SecureRandom secureRandom = new SecureRandom();\\n\\n    public TokenCipher(@Value(\\\"${eventbrite.oauth.encryption-key}\\\") String base64Key) {\\n        byte[] keyBytes = Base64.getDecoder().decode(base64Key);\\n        this.secretKey = new SecretKeySpec(keyBytes, ALGO);\\n    }\\n\\n    public String encrypt(String plaintext) {\\n        if (plaintext == null) {\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n        try {\\n            byte[] iv = new byte[IV_LENGTH];\\n            secureRandom.nextBytes(iv);\\n            Cipher cipher = Cipher.getInstance(TRANSFORMATION);\\n            cipher.init(Cipher.ENCRYPT_MODE, secretKey, new GCMParameterSpec(TAG_LENGTH, iv));\\n            byte[] encrypted = cipher.doFinal(plaintext.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));\\n            ByteBuffer buffer = ByteBuffer.allocate(iv.length + encrypted.length);\\n            buffer.put(iv);\\n            buffer.put(encrypted);\\n            return Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(buffer.array());\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"Failed to encrypt token\\\", ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    public String decrypt(String ciphertext) {\\n        if (ciphertext == null) {\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n        try {\\n            byte[] decoded = Base64.getDecoder().decode(ciphertext);\\n            ByteBuffer buffer = ByteBuffer.wrap(decoded);\\n            byte[] iv = new byte[IV_LENGTH];\\n            buffer.get(iv);\\n            byte[] encrypted = new byte[buffer.remaining()];\\n            buffer.get(encrypted);\\n            Cipher cipher = Cipher.getInstance(TRANSFORMATION);\\n            cipher.init(Cipher.DECRYPT_MODE, secretKey, new GCMParameterSpec(TAG_LENGTH, iv));\\n            byte[] decrypted = cipher.doFinal(encrypted);\\n            return new String(decrypted, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"Failed to decrypt token\\\", ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
```json
    "call_id": "call_HbRbS0HErwyN3d0YNYilR4Zc"
```

## Entry 348
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:57:59.867Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:57:59.867Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Designing Eventbrite token store and client**\n\nPlanning to add a token store managing OAuth tokens with repository, cipher, and OAuth client interface, plus DTO for token responses.     "type": "custom_tool_call",
```

```json
    "call_id": "call_TJMMaIyeuRSteWZ1t7IHtGwC",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/common/domain/Money.java\n@@\n-import java.math.BigDecimal;\n-import java.util.Objects;\n-\n-public record Money(BigDecimal amount, String currency) {\n+import jakarta.persistence.Embeddable;\n+import java.math.BigDecimal;\n+import java.util.Objects;\n+\n+@Embeddable\n+public record Money(BigDecimal amount, String currency) {\n     public Money {\n         Objects.requireNonNull(amount, \"amount must not be null\");\n         Objects.requireNonNull(currency, \"currency must not be null\");\n     }\n }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:59:02.685Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbOAuthClient.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbOAuthTokenResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class DefaultEbOAuthClient implements EbOAuthClient {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DefaultEbOAuthClient.class);\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public EbOAuthTokenResponse exchangeCodeForToken(String code, String redirectUri) {\\n        log.warn(\\\"EbOAuthClient not configured. code={} redirectUri={}\\\", code, redirectUri);\\n        throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"Eventbrite OAuth client not configured\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public EbOAuthTokenResponse refreshToken(String refreshToken) {\\n        log.warn(\\\"EbOAuthClient not configured. refreshToken provided\\\");\\n        throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"Eventbrite OAuth client not configured\\\");\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_Ac3l7MIO9P0GeKwwJNNEhDtk"
  }
}
```

## Entry 416
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:59:25.491Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:59:25.491Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/EbTokenStore.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrganizationAuth;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrgAuthStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbOAuthTokenResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbAuthException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.repository.OrganizationAuthRepository;\\nimport java.time.Duration;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class EbTokenStore {\\n\\n    private static final Duration REFRESH_WINDOW = Duration.ofMinutes(5);\\n\\n    private final OrganizationAuthRepository repository;\\n    private final EbOAuthClient oauthClient;\\n    private final TokenCipher tokenCipher;\\n\\n    public EbTokenStore(\\n        OrganizationAuthRepository repository,\\n        EbOAuthClient oauthClient,\\n        TokenCipher tokenCipher\\n    ) {\\n        this.repository = repository;\\n        this.oauthClient = oauthClient;\\n        this.tokenCipher = tokenCipher;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public OrganizationAuth connectOrganization(Long orgId, String code, String redirectUri) {\\n        EbOAuthTokenResponse tokenResponse = oauthClient.exchangeCodeForToken(code, redirectUri);\\n        if (tokenResponse == null || tokenResponse.accessToken() == null) {\\n            throw new EbAuthException(\\\"Eventbrite OAuth token exchange failed\\\");\\n        }\\n        OrganizationAuth auth = repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\\n            .orElseGet(() -> new OrganizationAuth(orgId, tokenResponse.ebOrganizationId(), \\\"\\\"));\\n\\n        auth.markConnected(\\n            tokenCipher.encrypt(tokenResponse.accessToken()),\\n            tokenCipher.encrypt(tokenResponse.refreshToken()),\\n            tokenResponse.expiresAt()\\n        );\\n        return repository.save(auth);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public OrganizationAuth getAuth(Long orgId) {\\n        return repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new EbAuthException(\\\"No Eventbrite auth configured for org: \\\" + orgId));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void disconnect(Long orgId) {\\n        OrganizationAuth auth = repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new EbAuthException(\\\"No Eventbrite auth configured for org: \\\" + orgId));\\n        auth.markRevoked();\\n        repository.save(auth);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public String getAccessToken(Long orgId) {\\n        OrganizationAuth auth = repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new EbAuthException(\\\"No Eventbrite auth configured for org: \\\" + orgId));\\n\\n        if (auth.getStatus() == OrgAuthStatus.REVOKED) {\\n            throw new EbAuthException(\\\"Eventbrite auth revoked for org: \\\" + orgId);\\n        }\\n\\n        if (shouldRefresh(auth)) {\\n            refreshToken(auth);\\n        }\\n\\n        return tokenCipher.decrypt(auth.getAccessTokenEncrypted());\\n    }\\n\\n    private boolean shouldRefresh(OrganizationAuth auth) {\\n        Instant expiresAt = auth.getExpiresAt();\\n        if (expiresAt == null) {\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return expiresAt.isBefore(Instant.now().plus(REFRESH_WINDOW));\\n    }\\n\\n    private void refreshToken(OrganizationAuth auth) {\\n        String refreshToken = tokenCipher.decrypt(auth.getRefreshTokenEncrypted());\\n        if (refreshToken == null) {\\n            auth.markTokenExpired();\\n            repository.save(auth);\\n            throw new EbAuthException(\\\"Eventbrite refresh token missing\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            EbOAuthTokenResponse refreshed = oauthClient.refreshToken(refreshToken);\\n            if (refreshed == null || refreshed.accessToken() == null) {\\n                auth.markTokenExpired();\\n                repository.save(auth);\\n                throw new EbAuthException(\\\"Eventbrite token refresh failed\\\");\\n            }\\n            auth.updateTokens(\\n                tokenCipher.encrypt(refreshed.accessToken()),\\n                tokenCipher.encrypt(refreshed.refreshToken()),\\n                refreshed.expiresAt()\\n            );\\n            repository.save(auth);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            auth.markTokenExpired();\\n            repository.save(auth);\\n            throw new EbAuthException(\\\"Eventbrite token refresh failed\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_fnV59Qc4l39ihXeGwCjmvjYZ"
  }
}
```

getAccessToken(Long orgId) {\\n        OrganizationAuth auth = repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new EbAuthException(\\\"No Eventbrite auth configured for org: \\\" + orgId));\\n\\n        if (auth.getStatus() == OrgAuthStatus.REVOKED) {\\n            throw new EbAuthException(\\\"Eventbrite auth revoked for org: \\\" + orgId);\\n        }\\n\\n        if (shouldRefresh(auth)) {\\n            refreshToken(auth);\\n        }\\n\\n        return tokenCipher.decrypt(auth.getAccessTokenEncrypted());\\n    }\\n\\n    private boolean shouldRefresh(OrganizationAuth auth) {\\n        Instant expiresAt = auth.getExpiresAt();\\n        if (expiresAt == null) {\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return expiresAt.isBefore(Instant.now().plus(REFRESH_WINDOW));\\n    }\\n\\n    private void refreshToken(OrganizationAuth auth) {\\n        String refreshToken = tokenCipher.decrypt(auth.getRefreshTokenEncrypted());\\n        if (refreshToken == null) {\\n            auth.markTokenExpired();\\n            repository.save(auth);\\n            throw new EbAuthException(\\\"Eventbrite refresh token missing\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            EbOAuthTokenResponse refreshed = oauthClient.refreshToken(refreshToken);\\n            if (refreshed == null || refreshed.accessToken() == null) {\\n                auth.markTokenExpired();\\n                repository.save(auth);\\n                throw new EbAuthException(\\\"Eventbrite token refresh failed\\\");\\n            }\\n            auth.updateTokens(\\n                tokenCipher.encrypt(refreshed.accessToken()),\\n                tokenCipher.encrypt(refreshed.refreshToken()),\\n                refreshed.expiresAt()\\n            );\\n            repository.save(auth);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            auth.markTokenExpired();\\n            repository.save(auth);\\n            throw new EbAuthException(\\\"Eventbrite token refresh failed\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
```json
    "call_id": "call_fnV59Qc4l39ihXeGwCjmvjYZ"
  }
}
```

## Entry 421
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T09:59:34.077Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:59:34.077Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/EbRetryPolicy.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport java.time.Duration;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class EbRetryPolicy {\\n\\n    private final int maxAttempts;\\n    private final Duration initialBackoff;\\n    private final Duration maxBackoff;\\n\\n    public EbRetryPolicy(\\n        @Value(\\\"${eventbrite.retry.max-attempts:3}\\\") int maxAttempts,\\n        @Value(\\\"${eventbrite.retry.initial-backoff-ms:250}\\\") long initialBackoffMs,\\n        @Value(\\\"${eventbrite.retry.max-backoff-ms:5000}\\\") long maxBackoffMs\\n    ) {\\n        this.maxAttempts = maxAttempts;\\n        this.initialBackoff = Duration.ofMillis(initialBackoffMs);\\n        this.maxBackoff = Duration.ofMillis(maxBackoffMs);\\n    }\\n\\n    public int getMaxAttempts() {\\n        return maxAttempts;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Duration getInitialBackoff() {\\n        return initialBackoff;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Duration getMaxBackoff() {\\n        return maxBackoff;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_9HfVtqcng73KMiWfTPcauGYk"
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T09:59:51.080Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_krSu6qF0CwFdcxAq99bkRmdN",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbEventSyncService.java\n@@\n-import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventDto;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventCreateRequest;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventDto;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventUpdateRequest;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\n@@\n     @Override\n     public EbEventDto getEventById(String eventId) {\n         log.warn(\"EbEventSyncService not configured. eventId={}\", eventId);\n         throw new EbIntegrationException(\"Eventbrite integration not configured\");\n     }\n+\n+    @Override\n+    public EbEventDto createDraft(Long organizationId, EbEventCreateRequest request) {\n+        log.warn(\"EbEventSyncService not configured. organizationId={}\", organizationId);\n+        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"Eventbrite integration not configured\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @Override\n+    public EbEventDto updateEvent(Long organizationId, String eventId, EbEventUpdateRequest request) {\n+        log.warn(\"EbEventSyncService not configured. organizationId={} eventId={}\", organizationId, eventId);\n+        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"Eventbrite integration not configured\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @Override\n+    public void publishEvent(Long organizationId, String eventId) {\n+        log.warn(\"EbEventSyncService not configured. organizationId={} eventId={}\", organizationId, eventId);\n+        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"Eventbrite integration not configured\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @Override\n+    public void cancelEvent(Long organizationId, String eventId) {\n+        log.warn(\"EbEventSyncService not configured. organizationId={} eventId={}\", organizationId, eventId);\n+        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"Eventbrite integration not configured\");\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

## Entry 439
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:00:04.599Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:00:04.599Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbVenueService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbVenueCreateRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbVenueResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class DefaultEbVenueService implements EbVenueService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DefaultEbVenueService.class);\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public EbVenueResponse createVenue(Long organizationId, EbVenueCreateRequest request) {\\n        log.warn(\\\"EbVenueService not configured. organizationId={}\\\", organizationId);\\n        throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"Eventbrite integration not configured\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public EbVenueResponse updateVenue(Long organizationId, String ebVenueId, EbVenueCreateRequest request) {\\n        log.warn(\\\"EbVenueService not configured. organizationId={} ebVenueId={}\\\", organizationId, ebVenueId);\\n        throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"Eventbrite integration not configured\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public EbVenueResponse getVenue(Long organizationId, String ebVenueId) {\\n        log.warn(\\\"EbVenueService not configured. organizationId={} ebVenueId={}\\\", organizationId, ebVenueId);\\n        throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"Eventbrite integration not configured\\\");\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_8nVv5V4qaVkRj6urvbTGMbHb"
  }
}
```

## Entry 447
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:00:18.194Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:00:18.194Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbTicketService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbInventoryTierRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbInventoryTierResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbTicketClassRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbTicketClassResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class DefaultEbTicketService implements EbTicketService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DefaultEbTicketService.class);\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public List<EbTicketClassResponse> createTicketClasses(String eventId, List<EbTicketClassRequest> ticketClasses) {\\n        log.warn(\\\"EbTicketService not configured. eventId={}\\\", eventId);\\n        throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"Eventbrite integration not configured\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public List<EbInventoryTierResponse> createInventoryTiers(String eventId, List<EbInventoryTierRequest> tiers) {\\n        log.warn(\\\"EbTicketService not configured. eventId={}\\\", eventId);\\n        throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"Eventbrite integration not configured\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public String copySeatMap(String eventId, String sourceSeatMapId) {\\n        log.warn(\\\"EbTicketService not configured. eventId={} seatMapId={}\\\", eventId, sourceSeatMapId);\\n        throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"Eventbrite integration not configured\\\");\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_tkWZYrJlbpFEG70dUCegDSAD"
  }
}
```

## Entry 461
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:00:34.603Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:00:34.603Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbScheduleService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbScheduleResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class DefaultEbScheduleService implements EbScheduleService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DefaultEbScheduleService.class);\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public EbScheduleResponse createSchedule(Long organizationId, String eventId, String recurrenceRule) {\\n        log.warn(\\\"EbScheduleService not configured. organizationId={} eventId={}\\\", organizationId, eventId);\\n        throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"Eventbrite integration not configured\\\");\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_0MoemaMyVezCzNTMPf5dzXh8"
  }
}
```

```json
{

    "call_id": "call_0MoemaMyVezCzNTMPf5dzXh8"

}
```
