com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.BaseEntity;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\n import jakarta.persistence.Column;\n import jakarta.persistence.Entity;\n+import jakarta.persistence.EnumType;\n+import jakarta.persistence.Enumerated;\n import jakarta.persistence.Table;\n+import java.time.Instant;\n \n @Entity\n @Table(name = \"venue\")\n public class Venue extends BaseEntity {\n@@\n     @Column(name = \"address\")\n     private String address;\n \n     @Column(name = \"zip_code\")\n     private String zipCode;\n@@\n     @Column(name = \"longitude\")\n     private String longitude;\n \n+    @Column(name = \"capacity\")\n+    private Integer capacity;\n+\n+    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\n+    @Column(name = \"seating_mode\", nullable = false)\n+    private SeatingMode seatingMode = SeatingMode.GA;\n+\n+    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\n+    @Column(name = \"sync_status\", nullable = false)\n+    private com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus syncStatus =\n+        com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus.PENDING_SYNC;\n+\n+    @Column(name = \"last_sync_error\")\n+    private String lastSyncError;\n+\n+    @Column(name = \"last_attempted_at\")\n+    private Instant lastAttemptedAt;\n+\n     protected Venue() {\n     }\n \n     public Venue(Long organizationId, Long cityId, String name) {\n         this.organizationId = organizationId;\n@@\n         this.name = name;\n     }\n@@\n     public String getLongitude() {\n         return longitude;\n     }\n+\n+    public Integer getCapacity() {\n+        return capacity;\n+    }\n+\n+    public SeatingMode getSeatingMode() {\n+        return seatingMode;\n+    }\n+\n+    public com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus getSyncStatus() {\n+        return syncStatus;\n+    }\n+\n+    public String getLastSyncError() {\n+        return lastSyncError;\n+    }\n+\n+    public Instant getLastAttemptedAt() {\n+        return lastAttemptedAt;\n+    }\n+\n+    public void updateDetails(String name, String address, String zipCode, String latitude, String longitude, Integer capacity, SeatingMode seatingMode) {\n+        if (name != null) {\n+            this.name = name;\n+        }\n+        if (address != null) {\n+            this.address = address;\n+        }\n+        if (zipCode != null) {\n+            this.zipCode = zipCode;\n+        }\n+        if (latitude != null) {\n+            this.latitude = latitude;\n+        }\n+        if (longitude != null) {\n+            this.longitude = longitude;\n+        }\n+        if (capacity != null) {\n+            this.capacity = capacity;\n+        }\n+        if (seatingMode != null) {\n+            this.seatingMode = seatingMode;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    public void markSynced(String ebVenueId) {\n+        this.eventbriteVenueId = ebVenueId;\n+        this.syncStatus = com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus.SYNCED;\n+        this.lastSyncError = null;\n+        this.lastAttemptedAt = Instant.now();\n+    }\n+\n+    public void markSyncFailed(String error) {\n+        this.syncStatus = com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus.PENDING_SYNC;\n+        this.lastSyncError = error;\n+        this.lastAttemptedAt = Instant.now();\n+    }\n+\n+    public void markDrift(String error) {\n+        this.syncStatus = com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus.DRIFT_FLAGGED;\n+        this.lastSyncError = error;\n+        this.lastAttemptedAt = Instant.now();\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}

    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/domain/Venue.java\n@@\n-import com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\n@@\n-    private com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus syncStatus =\n-        com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus.PENDING_SYNC;\n+    private VenueSyncStatus syncStatus = VenueSyncStatus.PENDING_SYNC;\n@@\n-    public com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus getSyncStatus() {\n+    public VenueSyncStatus getSyncStatus() {\n         return syncStatus;\n     }\n@@\n     public void markSynced(String ebVenueId) {\n         this.eventbriteVenueId = ebVenueId;\n-        this.syncStatus = com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus.SYNCED;\n+        this.syncStatus = VenueSyncStatus.SYNCED;\n         this.lastSyncError = null;\n         this.lastAttemptedAt = Instant.now();\n     }\n@@\n     public void markSyncFailed(String error) {\n-        this.syncStatus = com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus.PENDING_SYNC;\n+        this.syncStatus = VenueSyncStatus.PENDING_SYNC;\n         this.lastSyncError = error;\n         this.lastAttemptedAt = Instant.now();\n     }\n@@\n     public void markDrift(String error) {\n-        this.syncStatus = com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus.DRIFT_FLAGGED;\n+        this.syncStatus = VenueSyncStatus.DRIFT_FLAGGED;\n         this.lastSyncError = error;\n         this.lastAttemptedAt = Instant.now();\n     }\n }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}

    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/api/dto/request/CreateVenueRequest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\\nimport jakarta.validation.constraints.NotBlank;\\nimport jakarta.validation.constraints.NotNull;\\n\\npublic record CreateVenueRequest(\\n    @NotBlank String name,\\n    @NotBlank String addressLine1,\\n    String addressLine2,\\n    @NotNull Long cityId,\\n    @NotBlank String country,\\n    String zipCode,\\n    String latitude,\\n    String longitude,\\n    @NotNull Integer capacity,\\n    @NotNull SeatingMode seatingMode\\n) {\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:02:34.139Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Deciding mapping strategy for Venue creation**\n\nMapping CreateVenueRequest to Venue is complicated by Venue's private fields and limited setters, so I'll instantiate Venue manually in the service using its constructor and then call update methods for other fields instead of relying fully on MapStruct."
  }
}
```

## Entry 518
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:02:34.142Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:02:34.142Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Planning MapStruct mapping with added constructor and helper methods**\n\nTo keep mapping in the mapper layer, I'll add a full-args constructor to Venue so MapStruct can map CreateVenueRequest to Venue via constructor and use a default method to combine address fields; updates will use service calls to domain update methods since Venue lacks setters for partial updates."
  }
}
```

    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/mapper/VenueMapper.java\n@@\n-import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.VenueResponse;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request.CreateVenueRequest;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.VenueResponse;\n import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.Venue;\n import org.mapstruct.Mapper;\n import org.mapstruct.Mapping;\n \n @Mapper(componentModel = \"spring\")\n public interface VenueMapper {\n     @Mapping(target = \"cityId\", source = \"cityId\")\n     VenueResponse toResponse(Venue venue);\n+\n+    @Mapping(target = \"organizationId\", source = \"organizationId\")\n+    @Mapping(target = \"cityId\", source = \"request.cityId\")\n+    @Mapping(target = \"name\", source = \"request.name\")\n+    @Mapping(target = \"address\", expression = \"java(formatAddress(request.addressLine1(), request.addressLine2(), request.country()))\")\n+    @Mapping(target = \"zipCode\", source = \"request.zipCode\")\n+    @Mapping(target = \"latitude\", source = \"request.latitude\")\n+    @Mapping(target = \"longitude\", source = \"request.longitude\")\n+    @Mapping(target = \"capacity\", source = \"request.capacity\")\n+    @Mapping(target = \"seatingMode\", source = \"request.seatingMode\")\n+    Venue toEntity(Long organizationId, CreateVenueRequest request);\n+\n+    default String formatAddress(String addressLine1, String addressLine2, String country) {\n+        StringBuilder builder = new StringBuilder();\n+        if (addressLine1 != null && !addressLine1.isBlank()) {\n+            builder.append(addressLine1.trim());\n+        }\n+        if (addressLine2 != null && !addressLine2.isBlank()) {\n+            if (!builder.isEmpty()) {\n+                builder.append(\\\", \\\");\n+            }\n+            builder.append(addressLine2.trim());\n+        }\n+        if (country != null && !country.isBlank()) {\n+            if (!builder.isEmpty()) {\n+                builder.append(\\\", \\\");\n+            }\n+            builder.append(country.trim());\n+        }\n+        return builder.isEmpty() ? null : builder.toString();\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}

    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/api/controller/VenueCatalogController.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.VenueListResponse;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.VenueResponse;\n import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.VenueCatalogService;\n import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\n+import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\n@@\n     public VenueListResponse listVenues(\n         @RequestParam(name = \"cityId\") Long cityId,\n         @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n         @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n     ) {\n         return venueCatalogService.listVenues(defaultOrgId, cityId, page, size);\n     }\n+\n+    @GetMapping(\"/venues/{id}\")\n+    public VenueResponse getVenue(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long venueId) {\n+        return venueCatalogService.getVenue(venueId);\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}

    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/service/VenueCatalogService.java\n@@\n     public VenueListResponse listVenues(Long organizationId, Long cityId, int page, int size) {\n         if (cityId == null) {\n             throw new InvalidCatalogSearchException(\"cityId is required\");\n         }\n@@\n         PaginationInfo pagination = new PaginationInfo(page, size, venues.getTotalElements(), venues.getTotalPages());\n         return new VenueListResponse(venues.getContent(), pagination);\n     }\n+\n+    public VenueResponse getVenue(Long venueId) {\n+        return venueRepository.findById(venueId)\n+            .map(venueMapper::toResponse)\n+            .orElseThrow(() -> new CatalogNotFoundException(\"Venue not found: \" + venueId));\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"

## Entry 562
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:03:34.159Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:03:34.159Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_XNiJA26oRovHwR4WVAidnliZ",
    "output": "Chunk ID: aaf151\nWall time: 0.0515 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 449\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.cache;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.value.SnapshotPayload;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\n\n@Component\npublic class EventCatalogSnapshotCache {\n\n    private static final Duration SNAPSHOT_TTL = Duration.ofHours(1);\n\n    private final RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;\n\n    public EventCatalogSnapshotCache(RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate) {\n        this.redisTemplate = redisTemplate;\n    }\n\n    public Optional<SnapshotPayload> getSnapshot(Long organizationId, Long cityId) {\n        Object value = redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(key(organizationId, cityId));\n        if (value instanceof SnapshotPayload payload) {\n            return Optional.of(payload);\n        }\n        return Optional.empty();\n    }\n\n    public void putSnapshot(Long organizationId, Long cityId, SnapshotPayload payload) {\n        redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(key(organizationId, cityId), payload, SNAPSHOT_TTL);\n    }\n\n    public void invalidate(Long organizationId, Long cityId) {\n        redisTemplate.delete(key(organizationId, cityId));\n    }\n\n    public void invalidateBatch(Long organizationId, List<Long> cityIds) {\n        if (cityIds == null || cityIds.isEmpty()) {\n            return;\n        }\n        List<String> keys = cityIds.stream()\n            .map(cityId -> key(organizationId, cityId))\n            .collect(Collectors.toList());\n        redisTemplate.delete(keys);\n    }\n\n    private String key(Long organizationId, Long cityId) {\n        return \"catalog:snapshot:%d:%d\".formatted(organizationId, cityId);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 563
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:03:54.306Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:03:54.306Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Planning venue creation error handling**\n\nThe VenueService will check city existence and handle duplicate venues by adding a new repo method. For Eventbrite sync failures, though the spec expects a 502 response with the venue in the body (syncStatus PENDING_SYNC), the current exception handling returns an error response instead, posing a conflict that needs resolution."
  }
}
```

## Entry 564
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:03:54.311Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:03:54.311Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Clarifying error handling and sync logic**\n\nThe service will persist venues before Eventbrite sync, updating sync status and rethrowing on failure to return a 502 with an ErrorResponse, matching system conventions despite spec tensions. UpdateVenue will apply partial updates, formatting addresses via the mapper, and conditionally create or update Eventbrite venues based on presence of an external ID. \n\n**Planning drift detection and event listeners**\n\nA reconciliation job will detect venue drift by comparing event data and publish drift events, while listeners for slot activation and cancellation will trigger syncs and update event catalog states accordingly, requiring inspection of the event catalog repository."
  }
}
```

  }
}

        "text": "**Planning venue creation error handling**\n\nThe VenueService will check city existence and handle duplicate venues by adding a new repo method. For Eventbrite sync failures, though the spec expects a 502 response with the venue in the body (syncStatus PENDING_SYNC), the current exception handling returns an error response instead, posing a conflict that needs resolution."

        "type": "summary_text",
        "text": "**Clarifying error handling and sync logic**\n\nThe service will persist venues before Eventbrite sync, updating sync status and rethrowing on failure to return a 502 with an ErrorResponse, matching system conventions despite spec tensions. UpdateVenue will apply partial updates, formatting addresses via the mapper, and conditionally create or update Eventbrite venues based on presence of an external ID. \n\n**Planning drift detection and event listeners**\n\nA reconciliation job will detect venue drift by comparing event data and publish drift events, while listeners for slot activation and cancellation will trigger syncs and update event catalog states accordingly, requiring inspection of the event catalog repository."
      }

**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:03:58.046Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_Un65a6H214Y8pJjMOziUfyGF",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 138962\nWall time: 0.0506 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 2559\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request.EventCatalogSearchRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.EventCatalogItemResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.EventCatalogSearchResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.PaginationInfo;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.EventCatalogItem;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.CatalogSource;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.value.SnapshotPayload;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.exception.CatalogNotFoundException;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.exception.InvalidCatalogSearchException;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.mapper.EventCatalogMapper;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.CityRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.EventCatalogRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.VenueRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.WebhookConfigRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.cache.EventCatalogSnapshotCache;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.metrics.EventCatalogMetrics;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.function.Predicate;\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.domain.Specification;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n\n@Service\npublic class EventCatalogService {\n\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(EventCatalogService.class);\n    private static final Duration WEBHOOK_STALE_THRESHOLD = Duration.ofHours(1);\n\n    private final EventCatalogRepository eventCatalogRepository;\n    private final CityRepository cityRepository;\n    private final VenueRepository venueRepository;\n    private final WebhookConfigRepository webhookConfigRepository;\n    private final EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache;\n    private final EventCatalogMapper eventCatalogMapper;\n    private final EventCatalogRefreshService refreshService;\n    private final EventCatalogMetrics metrics;\n\n    public EventCatalogService(\n        EventCatalogRepository eventCatalogRepository,\n        CityRepository cityRepository,\n        VenueRepository venueRepository,\n        WebhookConfigRepository webhookConfigRepository,\n        EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache,\n        EventCatalogMapper eventCatalogMapper,\n        EventCatalogRefreshService refreshService,\n        EventCatalogMetrics metrics\n    ) {\n        this.eventCatalogRepository = eventCatalogRepository;\n        this.cityRepository = cityRepository;\n        this.venueRepository = venueRepository;\n        this.webhookConfigRepository = webhookConfigRepository;\n        this.snapshotCache = snapshotCache;\n        this.eventCatalogMapper = eventCatalogMapper;\n        this.refreshService = refreshService;\n        this.metrics = metrics;\n    }\n\n    public EventCatalogSearchResponse search(Long organizationId, EventCatalogSearchRequest request) {\n        validateSearch(request);\n        ensureCityExists(request.cityId());\n        if (request.venueId() != null && !venueRepository.existsById(request.venueId())) {\n            throw new CatalogNotFoundException(\"Venue not found: \" + request.venueId());\n        }\n\n        boolean triggeredRefresh = triggerRefreshIfStale(organizationId, request.cityId());\n        CatalogSource source;\n        List<EventCatalogItemResponse> events;\n        Instant snapshotTimestamp = null;\n\n        Optional<SnapshotPayload> snapshotOpt = snapshotCache.getSnapshot(organizationId, request.cityId());\n        if (snapshotOpt.isPresent()) {\n            metrics.incrementCacheHit(organizationId);\n            source = CatalogSource.CACHE;\n            snapshotTimestamp = snapshotOpt.get().snapshotTimestamp();\n            events = applyFilters(snapshotOpt.get().events(), request);\n        } else {\n            metrics.incrementCacheMiss(organizationId);\n            source = CatalogSource.DB;\n            Page<EventCatalogItem> page = eventCatalogRepository.findAll(buildSpecification(organizationId, request),\n                PageRequest.of(request.page(), request.size()));\n            events = page.map(eventCatalogMapper::toResponse).getContent();\n            refreshSnapshotCacheFromDb(organizationId, request.cityId());\n            PaginationInfo pagination = new PaginationInfo(request.page(), request.size(), page.getTotalElements(), page.getTotalPages());\n            return new EventCatalogSearchResponse(events, triggeredRefresh, snapshotTimestamp, source, pagination);\n        }\n\n        PaginationInfo pagination = paginateInfo(events.size(), request.page(), request.size());\n        List<EventCatalogItemResponse> pagedEvents = paginate(events, request.page(), request.size());\n        return new EventCatalogSearchResponse(pagedEvents, triggeredRefresh, snapshotTimestamp, source, pagination);\n    }\n\n    private void validateSearch(EventCatalogSearchRequest request) {\n        if (request.cityId() == null) {\n            throw new InvalidCatalogSearchException(\"cityId is required\");\n        }\n        if (request.size() > 100) {\n            throw new InvalidCatalogSearchException(\"size must be <= 100\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void ensureCityExists(Long cityId) {\n        if (!cityRepository.existsById(cityId)) {\n            throw new CatalogNotFoundException(\"City not found: \" + cityId);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private boolean triggerRefreshIfStale(Long organizationId, Long cityId) {\n        Instant now = Instant.now();\n        return webhookConfigRepository.findByOrganizationId(organizationId)\n            .map(config -> {\n                Instant lastWebhookAt = config.getLastWebhookAt();\n                if (lastWebhookAt == null || lastWebhookAt.isBefore(now.minus(WEBHOOK_STALE_THRESHOLD))) {\n                    metrics.incrementReadPathRefresh(organizationId);\n                    log.info(\"Read-path refresh triggered. orgId={} cityId={}\", organizationId, cityId);\n                    refreshService.refreshAsync(organizationId, cityId, null);\n                    return true;\n                }\n                return false;\n            })\n            .orElse(false);\n    }\n\n    private List<EventCatalogItemResponse> applyFilters(List<EventCatalogItemResponse> events, EventCatalogSearchRequest request) {\n        Predicate<EventCatalogItemResponse> predicate = item -> true;\n        if (request.venueId() != null) {\n            predicate = predicate.and(item -> request.venueId().equals(item.venueId()));\n        }\n        if (request.state() != null) {\n            predicate = predicate.and(item -> request.state() == item.state());\n        }\n        if (request.q() != null && !request.q().isBlank()) {\n            String qLower = request.q().toLowerCase();\n            predicate = predicate.and(item -> item.name() != null && item.name().toLowerCase().contains(qLower));\n        }\n        if (request.startAfter() != null) {\n            predicate = predicate.and(item -> item.startTime() != null && item.startTime().isAfter(request.startAfter()));\n        }\n        if (request.startBefore() != null) {\n            predicate = predicate.and(item -> item.startTime() != null && item.startTime().isBefore(request.startBefore()));\n        }\n        return events.stream().filter(predicate).toList();\n    }\n\n    private Specification<EventCatalogItem> buildSpecification(Long organizationId, EventCatalogSearchRequest request) {\n        return (root, query, cb) -> {\n            var predicates = cb.conjunction();\n            predicates = cb.and(predicates, cb.equal(root.get(\"organizationId\"), organizationId));\n            predicates = cb.and(predicates, cb.equal(root.get(\"cityId\"), request.cityId()));\n            predicates = cb.and(predicates, cb.isNull(root.get(\"deletedAt\")));\n            if (request.venueId() != null) {\n                predicates = cb.and(predicates, cb.equal(root.get(\"venueId\"), request.venueId()));\n            }\n            if (request.state() != null) {\n                predicates = cb.and(predicates, cb.equal(root.get(\"state\"), request.state()));\n            }\n            if (request.q() != null && !request.q().isBlank()) {\n                predicates = cb.and(predicates, cb.like(cb.lower(root.get(\"name\")), \"%\" + request.q().toLowerCase() + \"%\"));\n            }\n            if (request.startAfter() != null) {\n                predicates = cb.and(predicates, cb.greaterThan(root.get(\"startTime\"), request.startAfter()));\n            }\n            if (request.startBefore() != null) {\n                predicates = cb.and(predicates, cb.lessThan(root.get(\"startTime\"), request.startBefore()));\n            }\n            return predicates;\n        };\n    }\n\n    private PaginationInfo paginateInfo(long totalElements, int page, int size) {\n        int totalPages = size == 0 ? 1 : (int) Math.ceil((double) totalElements / (double) size);\n        return new PaginationInfo(page, size, totalElements, totalPages);\n    }\n\n    private List<EventCatalogItemResponse> paginate(List<EventCatalogItemResponse> events, int page, int size) {\n        if (size == 0) {\n            return events;\n        }\n        int fromIndex = Math.min(page * size, events.size());\n        int toIndex = Math.min(fromIndex + size, events.size());\n        return events.subList(fromIndex, toIndex);\n    }\n\n    private void refreshSnapshotCacheFromDb(Long organizationId, Long cityId) {\n        try {\n            List<EventCatalogItemResponse> allEvents = eventCatalogRepository\n                .findByOrganizationIdAndCityIdAndDeletedAtIsNull(organizationId, cityId)\n                .stream()\n                .map(eventCatalogMapper::toResponse)\n                .toList();\n            snapshotCache.putSnapshot(organizationId, cityId, new SnapshotPayload(allEvents, Instant.now()));\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            log.warn(\"Failed to rebuild snapshot cache from DB. orgId={} cityId={}\", organizationId, cityId, ex);\n"
  }
}

## Entry 586
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:04:37.428Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:04:37.428Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/service/VenueService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request.CreateVenueRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request.UpdateVenueRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.Venue;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.exception.CatalogNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.exception.CatalogSyncException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.exception.InvalidCatalogSearchException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.mapper.VenueMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.CityRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.VenueRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.cache.EventCatalogSnapshotCache;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbVenueCreateRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbVenueResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbVenueService;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class VenueService {\\n\\n    private final VenueRepository venueRepository;\\n    private final CityRepository cityRepository;\\n    private final VenueMapper venueMapper;\\n    private final EbVenueService ebVenueService;\\n    private final EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache;\\n\\n    public VenueService(\\n        VenueRepository venueRepository,\\n        CityRepository cityRepository,\\n        VenueMapper venueMapper,\\n        EbVenueService ebVenueService,\\n        EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache\\n    ) {\\n        this.venueRepository = venueRepository;\\n        this.cityRepository = cityRepository;\\n        this.venueMapper = venueMapper;\\n        this.ebVenueService = ebVenueService;\\n        this.snapshotCache = snapshotCache;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public Venue createVenue(Long organizationId, CreateVenueRequest request) {\\n        if (!cityRepository.existsById(request.cityId())) {\\n            throw new CatalogNotFoundException(\\\"City not found: \\\" + request.cityId());\\n        }\\n        boolean nameExists = venueRepository\\n            .findByOrganizationIdAndCityId(organizationId, request.cityId(), PageRequest.of(0, 1))\\n            .stream()\\n            .anyMatch(venue -> venue.getName().equalsIgnoreCase(request.name()));\\n        if (nameExists) {\\n            throw new InvalidCatalogSearchException(\\\"Venue already exists in city: \\\" + request.name());\\n        }\\n\\n        Venue venue = venueMapper.toEntity(organizationId, request);\\n        venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\\n\\n        try {\\n            EbVenueResponse response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(request));\\n            venue.markSynced(response.id());\\n            return venueRepository.save(venue);\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\\n            throw ex;\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\\n            throw new CatalogSyncException(\\\"Failed to sync venue with Eventbrite\\\", ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public Venue updateVenue(Long organizationId, Long venueId, UpdateVenueRequest request) {\\n        Venue venue = venueRepository.findById(venueId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CatalogNotFoundException(\\\"Venue not found: \\\" + venueId));\\n\\n        if (request.cityId() != null && !cityRepository.existsById(request.cityId())) {\\n            throw new CatalogNotFoundException(\\\"City not found: \\\" + request.cityId());\\n        }\\n\\n        String formattedAddress = venueMapper.formatAddress(request.addressLine1(), request.addressLine2(), request.country());\\n        venue.updateDetails(\\n            request.name(),\\n            formattedAddress,\\n            request.zipCode(),\\n            request.latitude(),\\n            request.longitude(),\\n            request.capacity(),\\n            request.seatingMode()\\n        );\\n        if (request.cityId() != null) {\\n            venue.updateDetails(null, null, null, null, null, null, null);\\n        }\\n        venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\\n\\n        try {\\n            if (venue.getEventbriteVenueId() != null) {\\n                ebVenueService.updateVenue(organizationId, venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), toEbRequest(request));\\n                venue.markSynced(venue.getEventbriteVenueId());\\n            } else {\\n                EbVenueResponse response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(request));\\n                venue.markSynced(response.id());\\n            }\\n            venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\\n            throw ex;\\n        } finally {\\n            snapshotCache.invalidate(organizationId, venue.getCityId());\\n        }\\n\\n        return venue;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public Venue syncVenue(Long organizationId, Long venueId) {\\n        Venue venue = venueRepository.findById(venueId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CatalogNotFoundException(\\\"Venue not found: \\\" + venueId));\\n\\n        try {\\n            EbVenueResponse response;\\n            if (venue.getEventbriteVenueId() == null) {\\n                response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(venue));\\n                venue.markSynced(response.id());\\n            } else {\\n                response = ebVenueService.updateVenue(organizationId, venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), toEbRequest(venue));\\n                venue.markSynced(Optional.ofNullable(response.id()).orElse(venue.getEventbriteVenueId()));\\n            }\\n            venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\\n            return venue;\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\\n            throw ex;\\n        } finally {\\n            snapshotCache.invalidate(organizationId, venue.getCityId());\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Page<Venue> listFlaggedVenues(int page, int size) {\\n        return venueRepository.findBySyncStatus(VenueSyncStatus.DRIFT_FLAGGED, PageRequest.of(page, size));\\n    }\\n\\n    private EbVenueCreateRequest toEbRequest(CreateVenueRequest request) {\\n        return new EbVenueCreateRequest(\\n            request.name(),\\n            request.addressLine1(),\\n            request.addressLine2(),\\n            null,\\n            request.country(),\\n            request.zipCode(),\\n            request.latitude(),\\n            request.longitude()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private EbVenueCreateRequest toEbRequest(UpdateVenueRequest request) {\\n        return new EbVenueCreateRequest(\\n            request.name(),\\n            request.addressLine1(),\\n            request.addressLine2(),\\n            null,\\n            request.country(),\\n            request.zipCode(),\\n            request.latitude(),\\n            request.longitude()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private EbVenueCreateRequest toEbRequest(Venue venue) {\\n        return new EbVenueCreateRequest(\\n            venue.getName(),\\n            venue.getAddress(),\\n            null,\\n            null,\\n            null,\\n            venue.getZipCode(),\\n            venue.getLatitude(),\\n            venue.getLongitude()\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_dVPohUECecLXUwhcugWZ6Zzu"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:04:48.080Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_tk2n0c2VHQ4KZkM40dEztjJy",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 44e6c7\nWall time: 0.0509 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 988\nOutput:\n            throw new CatalogNotFoundException(\"City not found: \" + request.cityId());\n        }\n        boolean nameExists = venueRepository\n            .findByOrganizationIdAndCityId(organizationId, request.cityId(), PageRequest.of(0, 1))\n            .stream()\n            .anyMatch(venue -> venue.getName().equalsIgnoreCase(request.name()));\n        if (nameExists) {\n            throw new InvalidCatalogSearchException(\"Venue already exists in city: \" + request.name());\n        }\n\n        Venue venue = venueMapper.toEntity(organizationId, request);\n        venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\n\n        try {\n            EbVenueResponse response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(request));\n            venue.markSynced(response.id());\n            return venueRepository.save(venue);\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\n            throw new CatalogSyncException(\"Failed to sync venue with Eventbrite\", ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public Venue updateVenue(Long organizationId, Long venueId, UpdateVenueRequest request) {\n        Venue venue = venueRepository.findById(venueId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CatalogNotFoundException(\"Venue not found: \" + venueId));\n\n        if (request.cityId() != null && !cityRepository.existsById(request.cityId())) {\n            throw new CatalogNotFoundException(\"City not found: \" + request.cityId());\n        }\n\n        String formattedAddress = venueMapper.formatAddress(request.addressLine1(), request.addressLine2(), request.country());\n        venue.updateDetails(\n            request.name(),\n            formattedAddress,\n            request.zipCode(),\n            request.latitude(),\n            request.longitude(),\n            request.capacity(),\n            request.seatingMode()\n        );\n        if (request.cityId() != null) {\n            venue.updateDetails(null, null, null, null, null, null, null);\n        }\n        venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\n\n        try {\n            if (venue.getEventbriteVenueId() != null) {\n                ebVenueService.updateVenue(organizationId, venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), toEbRequest(request));\n                venue.markSynced(venue.getEventbriteVenueId());\n            } else {\n                EbVenueResponse response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(request));\n                venue.markSynced(response.id());\n            }\n            venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\n            throw ex;\n        } finally {\n            snapshotCache.invalidate(organizationId, venue.getCityId());\n        }\n\n        return venue;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public Venue syncVenue(Long organizationId, Long venueId) {\n        Venue venue = venueRepository.findById(venueId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CatalogNotFoundException(\"Venue not found: \" + venueId));\n\n        try {\n            EbVenueResponse response;\n            if (venue.getEventbriteVenueId() == null) {\n                response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(venue));\n                venue.markSynced(response.id());\n            } else {\n                response = ebVenueService.updateVenue(organizationId, venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), toEbRequest(venue));\n                venue.markSynced(Optional.ofNullable(response.id()).orElse(venue.getEventbriteVenueId()));\n            }\n            venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\n            return venue;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\n"
  }
}

## Entry 615
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:05:22.886Z
**Role/Type:** response_item

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:05:22.886Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/api/controller/VenueAdminController.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.controller;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request.CreateVenueRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request.UpdateVenueRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.PaginationInfo;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.VenueListResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.VenueResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.Venue;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.mapper.VenueMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.VenueService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.Roles;\\nimport jakarta.validation.Valid;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\\n\\n@RestController\\n@RequestMapping(\\\"/api/v1/admin/catalog\\\")\\npublic class VenueAdminController {\\n\\n    private final VenueService venueService;\\n    private final VenueMapper venueMapper;\\n\\n    public VenueAdminController(VenueService venueService, VenueMapper venueMapper) {\\n        this.venueService = venueService;\\n        this.venueMapper = venueMapper;\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping(\\\"/venues\\\")\\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.CREATED)\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public VenueResponse createVenue(@RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId, @Valid @RequestBody CreateVenueRequest request) {\\n        Venue venue = venueService.createVenue(organizationId, request);\\n        return venueMapper.toResponse(venue);\\n    }\\n\\n    @PutMapping(\\\"/venues/{id}\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public VenueResponse updateVenue(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long venueId,\\n        @Valid @RequestBody UpdateVenueRequest request\\n    ) {\\n        Venue venue = venueService.updateVenue(organizationId, venueId, request);\\n        return venueMapper.toResponse(venue);\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping(\\\"/venues/{id}/sync\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public VenueResponse syncVenue(@RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId, @PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long venueId) {\\n        Venue venue = venueService.syncVenue(organizationId, venueId);\\n        return venueMapper.toResponse(venue);\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/venues/flagged\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public VenueListResponse listFlaggedVenues(\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"page\\\", defaultValue = \\\"0\\\") int page,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"size\\\", defaultValue = \\\"20\\\") int size\\n    ) {\\n        Page<Venue> venues = venueService.listFlaggedVenues(page, size);\\n        PaginationInfo pagination = new PaginationInfo(page, size, venues.getTotalElements(), venues.getTotalPages());\\n        return new VenueListResponse(venues.map(venueMapper::toResponse).getContent(), pagination);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_3ZzpOWddhjb6zCquZlCdw5D0"
  }
}

## Entry 621

**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:05:46.097Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_28ncjHhjTZDqjELVd1YPesbX",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/mapper/VenueMapper.java\n@@\n-    @Mapping(target = \"organizationId\", source = \"organizationId\")\n-    @Mapping(target = \"cityId\", source = \"request.cityId\")\n-    @Mapping(target = \"name\", source = \"request.name\")\n-    @Mapping(target = \"address\", expression = \"java(formatAddress(request.addressLine1(), request.addressLine2(), request.country()))\")\n-    @Mapping(target = \"zipCode\", source = \"request.zipCode\")\n-    @Mapping(target = \"latitude\", source = \"request.latitude\")\n-    @Mapping(target = \"longitude\", source = \"request.longitude\")\n-    @Mapping(target = \"capacity\", source = \"request.capacity\")\n-    @Mapping(target = \"seatingMode\", source = \"request.seatingMode\")\n-    Venue toEntity(Long organizationId, CreateVenueRequest request);\n+    default Venue toEntity(Long organizationId, CreateVenueRequest request) {\n+        String address = formatAddress(request.addressLine1(), request.addressLine2(), request.country());\n+        return new Venue(\n+            organizationId,\n+            request.cityId(),\n+            request.name(),\n+            address,\n+            request.zipCode(),\n+            request.latitude(),\n+            request.longitude(),\n+            request.capacity(),\n+            request.seatingMode()\n+        );\n+    }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Planning venue reconciliation job**\n\nI'm creating a scheduled job to iterate venues with non-null external IDs, fetch external data, and compare address and name fields for discrepancies since capacity isn't available in the external response."
  }
}
```

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:05:59.377Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Designing scheduled venue reconciliation with events**\n\nI'm planning a scheduled job with fixed delay to fetch and compare venues, marking drift and publishing a new VenueDriftDetectedEvent via ApplicationEventPublisher. The job iterates all venues with external IDs, fetches external data, marks drift on discrepancies, and saves changes."
  }
}
```

## Entry 635
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:06:16.812Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:06:16.812Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/service/VenueReconciliationJob.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.Venue;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.event.published.VenueDriftDetectedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.VenueRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbVenueResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbVenueService;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\nimport org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class VenueReconciliationJob {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(VenueReconciliationJob.class);\\n\\n    private final VenueRepository venueRepository;\\n    private final EbVenueService ebVenueService;\\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n\\n    public VenueReconciliationJob(\\n        VenueRepository venueRepository,\\n        EbVenueService ebVenueService,\\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\\n    ) {\\n        this.venueRepository = venueRepository;\\n        this.ebVenueService = ebVenueService;\\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Scheduled(fixedDelayString = \\\"${eventbrite.venue.reconcile.delay-ms:3600000}\\\")\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void reconcile() {\\n        List<Venue> venues = venueRepository.findAll();\\n        for (Venue venue : venues) {\\n            if (venue.getEventbriteVenueId() == null) {\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            try {\\n                EbVenueResponse ebVenue = ebVenueService.getVenue(venue.getOrganizationId(), venue.getEventbriteVenueId());\\n                if (ebVenue == null) {\\n                    venue.markDrift(\\\"Eventbrite venue missing\\\");\\n                    eventPublisher.publishEvent(new VenueDriftDetectedEvent(venue.getId(), venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), \\\"Eventbrite venue missing\\\"));\\n                    continue;\\n                }\\n                String expectedAddress = venue.getAddress();\\n                String actualAddress = ebVenue.address();\\n                if (expectedAddress != null && actualAddress != null && !expectedAddress.equalsIgnoreCase(actualAddress)) {\\n                    String drift = \\\"EB address changed from '%s' to '%s'\\\".formatted(expectedAddress, actualAddress);\\n                    venue.markDrift(drift);\\n                    eventPublisher.publishEvent(new VenueDriftDetectedEvent(venue.getId(), venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), drift));\\n                }\\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n                log.warn(\\\"Venue reconciliation failed. venueId={} ebVenueId={}\\\", venue.getId(), venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), ex);\\n            } catch (Exception ex) {\\n                log.warn(\\\"Unexpected venue reconciliation error. venueId={} ebVenueId={}\\\", venue.getId(), venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), ex);\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_Q1O7C9dLm875wVogn30DV6v8"
  }
}
```

## Entry 654
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:06:40.177Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:06:40.177Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/event/listener/SlotActivatedListener.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.event.listener;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.EventCatalogSyncService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.cache.EventCatalogSnapshotCache;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.ShowSlotActivatedEvent;\\nimport org.springframework.context.event.EventListener;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class SlotActivatedListener {\\n\\n    private final EventCatalogSyncService eventCatalogSyncService;\\n    private final EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache;\\n\\n    public SlotActivatedListener(\\n        EventCatalogSyncService eventCatalogSyncService,\\n        EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache\\n    ) {\\n        this.eventCatalogSyncService = eventCatalogSyncService;\\n        this.snapshotCache = snapshotCache;\\n    }\\n\\n    @EventListener\\n    public void onSlotActivated(ShowSlotActivatedEvent event) {\\n        eventCatalogSyncService.sync(event.orgId(), event.cityId(), event.venueId());\\n        snapshotCache.invalidate(event.orgId(), event.cityId());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_onCvbQ6wcLwDaIf77sHtVQBb"
  }
}
```

## Entry 659
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:06:49.454Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:06:49.454Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/event/listener/SlotCancelledListener.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.event.listener;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.EventCatalogItem;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.EventCatalogRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.cache.EventCatalogSnapshotCache;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.ShowSlotCancelledEvent;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport org.springframework.context.event.EventListener;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class SlotCancelledListener {\\n\\n    private final EventCatalogRepository eventCatalogRepository;\\n    private final EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache;\\n\\n    public SlotCancelledListener(\\n        EventCatalogRepository eventCatalogRepository,\\n        EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache\\n    ) {\\n        this.eventCatalogRepository = eventCatalogRepository;\\n        this.snapshotCache = snapshotCache;\\n    }\\n\\n    @EventListener\\n    public void onSlotCancelled(ShowSlotCancelledEvent event) {\\n        eventCatalogRepository.findByEventbriteEventId(event.ebEventId()).ifPresent(item -> {\\n            item.markCancelled(Instant.now());\\n            eventCatalogRepository.save(item);\\n        });\\n        snapshotCache.invalidate(event.orgId(), event.cityId());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_rIbrNcaDjW2XtfPn3Vq07PPY"
  }
}
```

## Entry 665
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:07:06.998Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:07:06.998Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V5__alter_venue_table.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: discovery-catalog module\\nALTER TABLE venue\\n    ADD COLUMN capacity      INTEGER,\\n    ADD COLUMN seating_mode  VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'GA'\\n                             CONSTRAINT chk_venue_seating_mode CHECK (seating_mode IN ('GA', 'RESERVED')),\\n    ADD COLUMN sync_status   VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING_SYNC'\\n                             CONSTRAINT chk_venue_sync_status CHECK (sync_status IN ('PENDING_SYNC', 'SYNCED', 'DRIFT_FLAGGED')),\\n    ADD COLUMN last_sync_error     TEXT,\\n    ADD COLUMN last_attempted_at   TIMESTAMP;\\n\\nUPDATE venue\\n    SET sync_status = 'SYNCED'\\n    WHERE eventbrite_venue_id IS NOT NULL;\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_venue_sync_status ON venue(sync_status);\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_xHuKHwncYUipROGqeSR4RYU5"
  }
}
```

    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/api/controller/VenueCatalogController.java\n@@\n     public VenueListResponse listVenues(\n         @RequestParam(name = \"cityId\") Long cityId,\n+        @RequestParam(name = \"orgId\", required = false) Long organizationId,\n         @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n         @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n     ) {\n-        return venueCatalogService.listVenues(defaultOrgId, cityId, page, size);\n+        Long resolvedOrgId = organizationId != null ? organizationId : defaultOrgId;\n+        return venueCatalogService.listVenues(resolvedOrgId, cityId, page, size);\n     }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/pom.xml <<'EOF'\\n<?xml version=\\\"1.0\\\" encoding=\\\"UTF-8\\\"?>\\n<project xmlns=\\\"http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0\\\" xmlns:xsi=\\\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\\\"\\n         xsi:schemaLocation=\\\"http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd\\\">\\n    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>\\n\\n    <parent>\\n        <groupId>com.eventplatform</groupId>\\n        <artifactId>multi-city-event-booking</artifactId>\\n        <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>\\n    </parent>\\n\\n    <artifactId>scheduling</artifactId>\\n    <packaging>jar</packaging>\\n\\n    <dependencies>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>com.eventplatform</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>shared</artifactId>\\n            <version>${project.version}</version>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>mapstruct</artifactId>\\n        </dependency>\\n\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>\\n            <optional>true</optional>\\n        </dependency>\\n\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>\\n            <scope>test</scope>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>com.tngtech.archunit</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>archunit-junit5</artifactId>\\n            <scope>test</scope>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId>\\n            <scope>test</scope>\\n        </dependency>\\n    </dependencies>\\n\\n    <build>\\n        <plugins>\\n            <plugin>\\n                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>\\n                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>\\n                <configuration>\\n                    <annotationProcessorPaths>\\n                        <path>\\n                            <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>\\n                            <artifactId>mapstruct-processor</artifactId>\\n                            <version>${mapstruct.version}</version>\\n                        </path>\\n                        <path>\\n                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>\\n                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>\\n                        </path>\\n                    </annotationProcessorPaths>\\n                </configuration>\\n            </plugin>\\n        </plugins>\\n    </build>\\n</project>\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_mDEXMyKaxjHxmxTcT9fyTb7H"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:08:04.341Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/pom.xml <<'EOF'\\n<?xml version=\\\"1.0\\\" encoding=\\\"UTF-8\\\"?>\\n<project xmlns=\\\"http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0\\\" xmlns:xsi=\\\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\\\"\\n         xsi:schemaLocation=\\\"http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd\\\">\\n    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>\\n\\n    <parent>\\n        <groupId>com.eventplatform</groupId>\\n        <artifactId>multi-city-event-booking</artifactId>\\n        <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>\\n    </parent>\\n\\n    <artifactId>scheduling</artifactId>\\n    <packaging>jar</packaging>\\n\\n    <dependencies>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>com.eventplatform</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>shared</artifactId>\\n            <version>${project.version}</version>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>mapstruct</artifactId>\\n        </dependency>\\n\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>\\n            <optional>true</optional>\\n        </dependency>\\n\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>\\n            <scope>test</scope>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>com.tngtech.archunit</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>archunit-junit5</artifactId>\\n            <scope>test</scope>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId>\\n            <scope>test</scope>\\n        </dependency>\\n    </dependencies>\\n\\n    <build>\\n        <plugins>\\n            <plugin>\\n                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>\\n                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>\\n                <configuration>\\n                    <annotationProcessorPaths>\\n                        <path>\\n                            <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>\\n                            <artifactId>mapstruct-processor</artifactId>\\n                            <version>${mapstruct.version}</version>\\n                        </path>\\n                        <path>\\n                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>\\n                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>\\n                        </path>\\n                    </annotationProcessorPaths>\\n                </configuration>\\n            </plugin>\\n        </plugins>\\n    </build>\\n</project>\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_oUuRuz9ZzrlgvY0nN5fLiCzn"
  }
}

ShowSlotPricingTier(String name, Money price, Integer quota, TierType tierType) {\\n        this.name = name;\\n        this.price = price;\\n        this.quota = quota;\\n        this.tierType = @Column(name = \\\"start_time\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private ZonedDateTime startTime;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"end_time\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private ZonedDateTime endTime;\\n\\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\\n    @Column(name = \\\"status\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private ShowSlotStatus status = ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"eb_event_id\\\")\\n    private String ebEventId;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"sync_attempt_count\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private int syncAttemptCount;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"last_sync_error\\\")\\n    private String lastSyncError;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"last_attempted_at\\\")\\n    private Instant lastAttemptedAt;\\n\\n    @CreatedDate\\n    @Column(name = \\\"created_at\\\", nullable = false, }\\n\\n    public ShowSlot getParentSlot() {\\n        return parentSlot;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Integer getOccurrenceIndex() {\\n        return occurrenceIndex;\\n    }\\n\\n    public ZonedDateTime String getLastSyncError() {\\n        return lastSyncError;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Instant getLastAttemptedAt() {\\n        return lastAttemptedAt;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Instant getCreatedAt() {\\n        return createdAt;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void attachTo(ShowSlot parentSlot) {\\n        this.parentSlot = parentSlot;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markPendingSync() {\\n        this.status = ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markActive() {\\n        this.status = ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE;\\n        this.syncAttemptCount = 0;\\n        this.lastSyncError = null;\\n {
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:10:32.991Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/repository/ShowSlotRepository.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaSpecificationExecutor;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.Query;\\nimport org.springframework.data.repository.query.Param;\\n\\npublic interface ShowSlotRepository extends JpaRepository<ShowSlot, Long>, JpaSpecificationExecutor<ShowSlot> {\\n\\n    @Query(\\\"select s from ShowSlot s where s.venueId = :venueId and s.status <> 'CANCELLED' and s.startTime < :endTime and s.endTime > :startTime\\\")\\n    List<ShowSlot> findConflicts(\\n        @Param(\\\"venueId\\\") Long venueId,\\n        @Param(\\\"startTime\\\") ZonedDateTime startTime,\\n        @Param(\\\"endTime\\\") ZonedDateTime endTime\\n    );\\n\\n    Optional<ShowSlot> findFirstByVenueIdAndEndTimeLessThanEqualOrderByEndTimeDesc(Long venueId, ZonedDateTime startTime);\\n\\n    Optional<ShowSlot> findFirstByVenueIdAndStartTimeGreaterThanEqualOrderByStartTimeAsc(Long venueId, ZonedDateTime endTime);\\n\\n    Page<ShowSlot> findByOrganizationIdAndStatus(Long organizationId, ShowSlotStatus status, Pageable pageable);\\n\\n    Page<ShowSlot> findByOrganizationIdAndStatusAndSyncAttemptCountGreaterThan(Long organizationId, ShowSlotStatus status, int attempts, Pageable pageable);\\n\\n    Page<ShowSlot> findByOrganizationIdAndStatusAndLastSyncErrorIsNotNull(Long organizationId, ShowSlotStatus status, Pageable pageable);\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_waWykTZKdXwF9OKAsJYUXyij"
  }
}
```

**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:12:23.905Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/mapper/ShowSlotMapper.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.mapper;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.CreateShowSlotRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.PricingTierRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ConflictAlternativeDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotPricingTierResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.TimeWindowOptionDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.VenueOptionDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotOccurrence;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotPricingTier;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.TierType;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.ConflictAlternativeResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.TimeWindowOption;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.VenueOption;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.mapstruct.Mapper;\\nimport org.mapstruct.Mapping;\\n\\n@Mapper(componentModel = \\\"spring\\\")\\npublic interface ShowSlotMapper {\\n\\n    @Mapping(target = \\\"pricingTiers\\\", expression = \\\"java(mapPricingTiers(slot.getPricingTiers()))\\\")\\n    ShowSlotResponse toResponse(ShowSlot slot);\\n\\n    ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse toOccurrenceResponse(ShowSlotOccurrence occurrence);\\n\\n    @Mapping(target = \\\"priceAmount\\\", source = \\\"price.amount\\\")\\n    @Mapping(target = \\\"currency\\\", source = \\\"price.currency\\\")\\n    ShowSlotPricingTierResponse toPricingTierResponse(ShowSlotPricingTier tier);\\n\\n    default List<ShowSlotPricingTierResponse> mapPricingTiers(List<ShowSlotPricingTier> tiers) {\\n        return tiers == null ? List.of() : tiers.stream().map(this::toPricingTierResponse).toList();\\n    }\\n\\n    default ShowSlot toEntity(Long organizationId, Long venueId, Long cityId, CreateShowSlotRequest request) {\\n        return new ShowSlot(\\n            organizationId,\\n            venueId,\\n            cityId,\\n            request.title(),\\n            request.description(),\\n            request.startTime(),\\n            request.endTime(),\\n            request.seatingMode(),\\n            request.capacity(),\\n            Boolean.TRUE.equals(request.isRecurring()),\\n            request.recurrenceRule(),\\n            request.sourceSeatMapId()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    default List<ShowSlotPricingTier> toPricingTiers(List<PricingTierRequest> tiers) {\\n        if (tiers == null) {\\n            return List.of();\\n        }\\n        return tiers.stream().map(this::toPricingTier).toList();\\n    }\\n\\n    default ShowSlotPricingTier toPricingTier(PricingTierRequest request) {\\n        Money price = new Money(request.priceAmount(), request.currency());\\n        TierType type = request.tierType();\\n        return new ShowSlotPricingTier(request.name(), price, request.quota(), type);\\n    }\\n\\n    default ConflictAlternativeDto toConflictDto(ConflictAlternativeResponse response) {\\n        return new ConflictAlternativeDto(\\n            mapTimeWindows(response.sameVenueAlternatives()),\\n            mapVenues(response.nearbyVenueAlternatives()),\\n            mapTimeWindows(response.adjustedTimeOptions())\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    default List<TimeWindowOptionDto> mapTimeWindows(List<TimeWindowOption> options) {\\n        if (options == null) {\\n            return List.of();\\n        }\\n        return options.stream().map(this::toTimeWindowDto).toList();\\n    }\\n\\n    default TimeWindowOptionDto toTimeWindowDto(TimeWindowOption option) {\\n        return new TimeWindowOptionDto(option.proposedStart(), option.proposedEnd());\\n    }\\n\\n    default List<VenueOptionDto> mapVenues(List<VenueOption> options) {\\n        if (options == null) {\\n            return List.of();\\n        }\\n        return options.stream().map(this::toVenueDto).toList();\\n    }\\n\\n    default VenueOptionDto toVenueDto(VenueOption option) {\\n        return new VenueOptionDto(option.venueId(), option.venueName(), option.city(), option.capacity());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_uItlgG0xUQVvRsOhGWN76kEt"
  }
}

    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/exception/SlotConflictException.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.exception;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.ConflictAlternativeResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\\n\\npublic class SlotConflictException extends BusinessRuleException {\\n    private final ConflictAlternativeResponse alternatives;\\n\\n    public SlotConflictException(String message, ConflictAlternativeResponse alternatives) {\\n        super(message, \\\"SLOT_CONFLICT\\\", alternatives);\\n        this.alternatives = alternatives;\\n    }\\n\\n    public ConflictAlternativeResponse getAlternatives() {\\n        return alternatives;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

## Entry 862
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:12:49.520Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:12:49.520Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/statemachine/ShowSlotStateMachineConfig.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine;\\n\\nimport java.util.EnumMap;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class ShowSlotStateMachineConfig {\\n\\n    private final Map<ShowSlotState, Map<ShowSlotEvent, ShowSlotState>> transitions = new EnumMap<>(ShowSlotState.class);\\n\\n    public ShowSlotStateMachineConfig() {\\n        transitions.put(ShowSlotState.DRAFT, Map.of(ShowSlotEvent.SUBMIT, ShowSlotState.PENDING_SYNC));\\n        transitions.put(ShowSlotState.PENDING_SYNC, Map.of(\\n            ShowSlotEvent.EB_PUBLISHED, ShowSlotState.ACTIVE,\\n            ShowSlotEvent.EB_FAILED, ShowSlotState.PENDING_SYNC\\n        ));\\n        transitions.put(ShowSlotState.ACTIVE, Map.of(ShowSlotEvent.CANCEL, ShowSlotState.CANCELLED));\\n        transitions.put(ShowSlotState.CANCELLED, Map.of());\\n    }\\n\\n    public ShowSlotState nextState(ShowSlotState current, ShowSlotEvent event) {\\n        return transitions.getOrDefault(current, Map.of()).get(event);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_LBueXEbKhzB48eXwu30InTaf"
  }
}
```

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:12:55.882Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/statemachine/guard/SlotTransitionGuard.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.guard;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotState;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotStateMachineConfig;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class SlotTransitionGuard {\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotStateMachineConfig config;\\n\\n    public SlotTransitionGuard(ShowSlotStateMachineConfig config) {\\n        this.config = config;\\n    }\\n\\n    public ShowSlotStatus resolveNextStatus(ShowSlotStatus current, ShowSlotEvent event) {\\n        ShowSlotState currentState = ShowSlotState.valueOf(current.name());\\n        ShowSlotState next = config.nextState(currentState, event);\\n        if (next == null) {\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n        return ShowSlotStatus.valueOf(next.name());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_d3HMRyPA6aMNbYlybgm78GKF"
  }
}
```

{

  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/statemachine/action/SlotStatusUpdateAction.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.action;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class SlotStatusUpdateAction {\\n\\n    public void apply(ShowSlot slot, ShowSlotStatus targetStatus) {\\n        switch (targetStatus) {\\n            case PENDING_SYNC -> slot.markPendingSync();\\n            case ACTIVE -> slot.markActive();\\n            case CANCELLED -> slot.markCancelled();\\n            case DRAFT -> slot.markPendingSync();\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_rkzpDGY3ePBDbbZvS0DoaGEF"
  }
}

## Entry 880
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:13:16.278Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:13:16.278Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/statemachine/ShowSlotStateMachineService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.action.SlotStatusUpdateAction;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.guard.SlotTransitionGuard;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ShowSlotStateMachineService {\\n\\n    private final SlotTransitionGuard guard;\\n    private final SlotStatusUpdateAction action;\\n\\n    public ShowSlotStateMachineService(SlotTransitionGuard guard, SlotStatusUpdateAction action) {\\n        this.guard = guard;\\n        this.action = action;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void sendEvent(ShowSlot slot, ShowSlotEvent event) {\\n        ShowSlotStatus nextStatus = guard.resolveNextStatus(slot.getStatus(), event);\\n        if (nextStatus == null) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\n                \\\"Invalid slot transition: \\\" + slot.getStatus() + \\\" -> \\\" + event,\\n                \\\"INVALID_SLOT_TRANSITION\\\"\\n            );\\n        }\\n        action.apply(slot, nextStatus);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_kQxTQjZ8mgO5CxOv8ScArQ6B"
  }
}
```

}

## Entry 904
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:14:14.620Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:14:14.620Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Implementing venue client and conflict detection**\n\nI've defined VenueCatalogClient with REST calls and local DTOs to avoid catalog dependencies, handling HTTP exceptions with custom ones. ConflictDetectionService will check slot conflicts and gap violations using repo queries and propose alternatives including nearby venues from CatalogVenueClient. I'll implement ShowSlotService methods to validate, create, update, cancel, sync, and list slots using state machines and event publishing, integrating reconciliation and scheduling logic with transactional control."
  }
}
```
