## Entry 920
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:14:34.505Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:14:34.505Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/client/VenueCatalogClient.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.exception.SchedulingNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.IntegrationException;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClientResponseException;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class VenueCatalogClient {\\n\\n    private final RestClient restClient;\\n\\n    public VenueCatalogClient(@Value(\\\"${app.internal-base-url:http://localhost:8080}\\\") String baseUrl) {\\n        this.restClient = RestClient.builder().baseUrl(baseUrl).build();\\n    }\\n\\n    public CatalogVenueResponse getVenue(Long venueId) {\\n        try {\\n            return restClient.get()\\n                .uri(\\\"/api/v1/catalog/venues/{id}\\\", venueId)\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .body(CatalogVenueResponse.class);\\n        } catch (RestClientResponseException ex) {\\n            if (ex.getStatusCode() == HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND) {\\n                throw new SchedulingNotFoundException(\\\"Venue not found via catalog: \\\" + venueId, \\\"VENUE_NOT_FOUND\\\");\\n            }\\n            throw new IntegrationException(\\\"Failed to fetch venue from catalog\\\", \\\"CATALOG_INTEGRATION_ERROR\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    public List<CatalogVenueResponse> listVenuesByCity(Long cityId, Long organizationId) {\\n        try {\\n            CatalogVenueListResponse response = restClient.get()\\n                .uri(uriBuilder -> uriBuilder\\n                    .path(\\\"/api/v1/catalog/venues\\\")\\n                    .queryParam(\\\"cityId\\\", cityId)\\n                    .queryParam(\\\"orgId\\\", organizationId)\\n                    .build())\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .body(CatalogVenueListResponse.class);\\n            return response == null || response.venues() == null ? List.of() : response.venues();\\n        } catch (RestClientResponseException ex) {\\n            throw new IntegrationException(\\\"Failed to fetch venues from catalog\\\", \\\"CATALOG_INTEGRATION_ERROR\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_M0ECxq4UQ3ySQ6JcU6Fuir5x"
  }
}
```

com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.IntegrationException;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClientResponseException;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class VenueCatalogClient {\\n\\n    private final RestClient restClient;\\n\\n    public VenueCatalogClient(@Value(\\\"${app.internal-base-url:http://localhost:8080}\\\") String baseUrl) {\\n        this.restClient = RestClient.builder().baseUrl(baseUrl).build();\\n    }\\n\\n    public CatalogVenueResponse getVenue(Long venueId) {\\n        try {\\n            return restClient.get()\\n                .uri(\\\"/api/v1/catalog/venues/{id}\\\", venueId)\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .body(CatalogVenueResponse.class);\\n        } catch (RestClientResponseException ex) {\\n            if (ex.getStatusCode() == HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND) {\\n                throw new SchedulingNotFoundException(\\\"Venue not found via catalog: \\\" + venueId, \\\"VENUE_NOT_FOUND\\\");\\n            }\\n            throw new IntegrationException(\\\"Failed to fetch venue from catalog\\\", \\\"CATALOG_INTEGRATION_ERROR\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    public List<CatalogVenueResponse> listVenuesByCity(Long cityId, Long organizationId) {\\n        try {\\n            CatalogVenueListResponse response = restClient.get()\\n                .uri(uriBuilder -> uriBuilder\\n                    .path(\\\"/api/v1/catalog/venues\\\")\\n                    .queryParam(\\\"cityId\\\", cityId)\\n                    .queryParam(\\\"orgId\\\", organizationId)\\n                    .build())\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .body(CatalogVenueListResponse.class);\\n            return response == null || response.venues() == null ? List.of() : response.venues();\\n        } catch (RestClientResponseException ex) {\\n            throw new IntegrationException(\\\"Failed to fetch venues from catalog\\\", \\\"CATALOG_INTEGRATION_ERROR\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_M0ECxq4UQ3ySQ6JcU6Fuir5x"
  }
}

## Entry 925
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:14:55.968Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:14:55.968Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/ConflictDetectionService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.ConflictAlternativeResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.TimeWindowOption;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.VenueOption;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.exception.SlotConflictException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client.CatalogVenueResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client.VenueCatalogClient;\\nimport java.time.Duration;\\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\\nimport java.util.Comparator;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ConflictDetectionService {\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\\n    private final VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient;\\n    private final Duration gapPolicy;\\n\\n    public ConflictDetectionService(\\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\\n        VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient,\\n        @Value(\\\"${scheduling.turnaround-gap-minutes:60}\\\") long gapMinutes\\n    ) {\\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\\n        this.venueCatalogClient = venueCatalogClient;\\n        this.gapPolicy = Duration.ofMinutes(gapMinutes);\\n    }\\n\\n    public void validateOrThrow(Long organizationId, CatalogVenueResponse venue, ZonedDateTime startTime, ZonedDateTime endTime) {\\n        List<ShowSlot> overlaps = showSlotRepository.findConflicts(venue.id(), startTime, endTime);\\n        boolean gapViolation = hasGapViolation(venue.id(), startTime, endTime);\\n\\n        if (!overlaps.isEmpty() || gapViolation) {\\n            ConflictAlternativeResponse alternatives = buildAlternatives(organizationId, venue, startTime, endTime);\\n            throw new SlotConflictException(\\\"Venue has an overlapping slot or turnaround gap violation\\\", alternatives);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private boolean hasGapViolation(Long venueId, ZonedDateTime startTime, ZonedDateTime endTime) {\\n        return showSlotRepository.findFirstByVenueIdAndEndTimeLessThanEqualOrderByEndTimeDesc(venueId, startTime)\\n            .map(slot -> Duration.between(slot.getEndTime(), startTime).compareTo(gapPolicy) < 0)\\n            .orElse(false)\\n            || showSlotRepository.findFirstByVenueIdAndStartTimeGreaterThanEqualOrderByStartTimeAsc(venueId, endTime)\\n                .map(slot -> Duration.between(endTime, slot.getStartTime()).compareTo(gapPolicy) < 0)\\n                .orElse(false);\\n    }\\n\\n    private ConflictAlternativeResponse buildAlternatives(\\n        Long organizationId,\\n        CatalogVenueResponse venue,\\n        ZonedDateTime startTime,\\n        ZonedDateTime endTime\\n    ) {\\n        Duration duration = Duration.between(startTime, endTime);\\n\\n        TimeWindowOption sameVenue = showSlotRepository\\n            .findFirstByVenueIdAndEndTimeLessThanEqualOrderByEndTimeDesc(venue.id(), startTime)\\n            .map(prev -> new TimeWindowOption(prev.getEndTime().plus(gapPolicy), prev.getEndTime().plus(gapPolicy).plus(duration)))\\n            .orElse(new TimeWindowOption(startTime.plusDays(1), endTime.plusDays(1)));\\n\\n        TimeWindowOption adjusted = showSlotRepository\\n            .findFirstByVenueIdAndStartTimeGreaterThanEqualOrderByStartTimeAsc(venue.id(), endTime)\\n            .map(next -> {\\n                ZonedDateTime newEnd = next.getStartTime().minus(gapPolicy);\\n                ZonedDateTime newStart = newEnd.minus(duration);\\n                return new TimeWindowOption(newStart, newEnd);\\n            })\\n            .orElse(sameVenue);\\n\\n        List<VenueOption> nearby = venueCatalogClient.listVenuesByCity(venue.cityId(), organizationId).stream()\\n            .filter(candidate -> !candidate.id().equals(venue.id()))\\n            .sorted(Comparator.comparingInt(candidate -> Math.abs(candidate.capacity() - venue.capacity())))\\n            .limit(3)\\n            .map(candidate -> new VenueOption(candidate.id(), candidate.name(), String.valueOf(venue.cityId()),\\n                candidate.capacity() == null ? 0 : candidate.capacity()))\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        return new ConflictAlternativeResponse(\\n            List.of(sameVenue),\\n            nearby,\\n            List.of(adjusted)\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_2kg15gvEzH92tJkEVwghRNI2"
  }
}
```

org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ConflictDetectionService {\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\\n    private final VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient;\\n    private final Duration gapPolicy;\\n\\n    public ConflictDetectionService(\\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\\n        VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient,\\n        @Value(\\\"${scheduling.turnaround-gap-minutes:60}\\\") long gapMinutes\\n    ) {\\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\\n ZonedDateTime startTime, ZonedDateTime endTime) {\\n        List<ShowSlot> overlaps = showSlotRepository.findConflicts(venue.id(), startTime, endTime);\\n        boolean gapViolation = hasGapViolation(venue.id(), startTime, endTime);\\n\\n        if (!overlaps.isEmpty() || gapViolation) {\\n            ConflictAlternativeResponse alternatives = buildAlternatives(organizationId, venue, startTime, endTime);\\n            throw new SlotConflictException(\\\"Venue has an overlapping slot or turnaround gap violation\\\", alternatives);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private boolean hasGapViolation(Long venueId, ZonedDateTime startTime, ZonedDateTime endTime) {\\n        return showSlotRepository.findFirstByVenueIdAndEndTimeLessThanEqualOrderByEndTimeDesc(venueId, startTime)\\n            .map(slot -> Duration.between(slot.getEndTime(), startTime).compareTo(gapPolicy) < 0)\\n            .orElse(false)\\n            || showSlotRepository.findFirstByVenueIdAndStartTimeGreaterThanEqualOrderByStartTimeAsc(venueId, endTime)\\n                .map(slot -> Duration.between(endTime, slot.getStartTime()).compareTo(gapPolicy) < 0)\\n                .orElse(false);\\n    }\\n\\n    private ConflictAlternativeResponse buildAlternatives(\\n        Long organizationId,\\n        CatalogVenueResponse venue,\\n        ZonedDateTime startTime,\\n        ZonedDateTime endTime\\n    ) {\\n        Duration duration = Duration.between(startTime, endTime);\\n\\n        TimeWindowOption sameVenue = showSlotRepository\\n            .findFirstByVenueIdAndEndTimeLessThanEqualOrderByEndTimeDesc(venue.id(), startTime)\\n            .map(prev -> new TimeWindowOption(prev.getEndTime().plus(gapPolicy), prev.getEndTime().plus(gapPolicy).plus(duration)))\\n            .orElse(new TimeWindowOption(startTime.plusDays(1), endTime.plusDays(1)));\\n\\n        TimeWindowOption adjusted = showSlotRepository\\n            .findFirstByVenueIdAndStartTimeGreaterThanEqualOrderByStartTimeAsc(venue.id(), endTime)\\n            .map(next -> {\\n                ZonedDateTime newEnd = next.getStartTime().minus(gapPolicy);\\n                ZonedDateTime newStart = newEnd.minus(duration);\\n                return new TimeWindowOption(newStart, newEnd);\\n            })\\n            .orElse(sameVenue);\\n\\n        List<VenueOption> nearby = venueCatalogClient.listVenuesByCity(venue.cityId(), organizationId).stream()\\n            .filter(candidate -> !candidate.id().equals(venue.id()))\\n            .sorted(Comparator.comparingInt(candidate -> Math.abs(candidate.capacity() - venue.capacity())))\\n            .limit(3)\\n            .map(candidate -> new VenueOption(candidate.id(), candidate.name(), String.valueOf(venue.cityId()),\\n                candidate.capacity() == null ? 0 : candidate.capacity()))\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        return new ConflictAlternativeResponse(\\n            List.of(sameVenue),\\n            nearby,\\n            List.of(adjusted)\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_2kg15gvEzH92tJkEVwghRNI2"
  }
}

    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/ConflictDetectionService.java\n@@\n-        List<VenueOption> nearby = venueCatalogClient.listVenuesByCity(venue.cityId(), organizationId).stream()\n-            .filter(candidate -> !candidate.id().equals(venue.id()))\n-            .sorted(Comparator.comparingInt(candidate -> Math.abs(candidate.capacity() - venue.capacity())))\n-            .limit(3)\n-            .map(candidate -> new VenueOption(candidate.id(), candidate.name(), String.valueOf(venue.cityId()),\n-                candidate.capacity() == null ? 0 : candidate.capacity()))\n-            .toList();\n+        int venueCapacity = venue.capacity() == null ? 0 : venue.capacity();\n+        List<VenueOption> nearby = venueCatalogClient.listVenuesByCity(venue.cityId(), organizationId).stream()\n+            .filter(candidate -> !candidate.id().equals(venue.id()))\n+            .sorted(Comparator.comparingInt(candidate -> {\n+                int candidateCapacity = candidate.capacity() == null ? 0 : candidate.capacity();\n+                return Math.abs(candidateCapacity - venueCapacity);\n+            }))\n+            .limit(3)\n+            .map(candidate -> new VenueOption(candidate.id(), candidate.name(), String.valueOf(venue.cityId()),\n+                candidate.capacity() == null ? 0 : candidate.capacity()))\n+            .toList();\n*** End Patch"
  }
}

{

  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/ShowSlotService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.CreateShowSlotRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.UpdateShowSlotRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotOccurrence;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotPricingTier;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.exception.SchedulingNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.mapper.ShowSlotMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotPricingTierRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client.CatalogVenueResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client.VenueCatalogClient;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotStateMachineService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.ShowSlotActivatedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.ShowSlotCancelledEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.SlotDraftCreatedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.SlotSyncFailedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncFailedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.IntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventCreateRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventUpdateRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbScheduleResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbCapacityService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbEventSyncService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbScheduleService;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.domain.Specification;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ShowSlotService {\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\\n    private final ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository;\\n    private final ShowSlotPricingTierRepository pricingTierRepository;\\n    private final ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper;\\n    private final VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient;\\n    private final ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService;\\n    private final EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService;\\n    private final EbScheduleService ebScheduleService;\\n    private final EbCapacityService ebCapacityService;\\n    private final ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService;\\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n\\n    public ShowSlotService(\\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\\n        ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository,\\n        ShowSlotPricingTierRepository pricingTierRepository,\\n        ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper,\\n        VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient,\\n        ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService,\\n        EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService,\\n        EbScheduleService ebScheduleService,\\n        EbCapacityService ebCapacityService,\\n        ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService,\\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\\n    ) {\\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\\n        this.occurrenceRepository = occurrenceRepository;\\n        this.pricingTierRepository = pricingTierRepository;\\n        this.showSlotMapper = showSlotMapper;\\n        this.venueCatalogClient = venueCatalogClient;\\n        this.conflictDetectionService = conflictDetectionService;\\n        this.ebEventSyncService = ebEventSyncService;\\n        this.ebScheduleService = ebScheduleService;\\n        this.ebCapacityService = ebCapacityService;\\n        this.stateMachineService = stateMachineService;\\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public ShowSlot createSlot(Long organizationId, CreateShowSlotRequest request) {\\n        CatalogVenueResponse venue = venueCatalogClient.getVenue(request.venueId());\\n        conflictDetectionService.validateOrThrow(organizationId, venue, request.startTime(), request.endTime());\\n\\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotMapper.toEntity(organizationId, request.venueId(), venue.cityId(), request);\\n        List<ShowSlotPricingTier> tiers = showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers());\\n        tiers.forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\\n\\n        return showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public ShowSlot submitSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.SUBMIT);\\n\\n        try {\\n            EbEventDto created = ebEventSyncService.createDraft(organizationId, toEbCreateRequest(slot));\\n            slot.setEbEventId(created.id());\\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(null);\\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(\\n                slot.getId(),\\n                slot.getEbEventId(),\\n                slot.getPricingTiers().stream().map(ShowSlotPricingTier::getId).toList(),\\n                slot.getSeatingMode(),\\n                organizationId,\\n                slot.getSourceSeatMapId()\\n            ));\\n            return slot;\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\\n            throw ex;\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\\n            throw new IntegrationException(\\\"Failed to create Eventbrite draft\\\", \\\"EB_DRAFT_FAILED\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void onTicketSyncComplete(TicketSyncCompletedEvent event, Long organizationId) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\\n        try {\\n            ebEventSyncService.publishEvent(organizationId, event.ebEventId());\\n            stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.EB_PUBLISHED);\\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ShowSlotActivatedEvent(\\n                slot.getId(),\\n                slot.getEbEventId(),\\n                organizationId,\\n                slot.getVenueId(),\\n                slot.getCityId()\\n            ));\\n            if (slot.isRecurring() && slot.getRecurrenceRule() != null) {\\n                EbScheduleResponse scheduleResponse = ebScheduleService.createSchedule(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getRecurrenceRule());\\n                slot.setEbSeriesId(scheduleResponse.seriesId());\\n                if (scheduleResponse.occurrences() != null) {\\n                    int index = 1;\\n                    for (var occurrence : scheduleResponse.occurrences()) {\\n                        ShowSlotOccurrence child = new ShowSlotOccurrence(index++, occurrence.startTime(), occurrence.endTime());\\n                        child.setEbEventId(occurrence.eventId());\\n                        slot.addOccurrence(child);\\n                    }\\n                }\\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n            }\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\\n            throw ex;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void onTicketSyncFailed(TicketSyncFailedEvent event) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\\n        slot.recordSyncFailure(event.reason());\\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), event.reason()));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public ShowSlot updateSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId, UpdateShowSlotRequest request) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Cannot update a cancelled slot\\\", \\\"SLOT_CANCELLED\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        Integer previousCapacity = slot.getCapacity();\\n        slot.updateDetails(request.title(), request.description(), request.startTime(), request.endTime(), request.capacity());\\n\\n        if (request.pricingTiers() != null) {\\n            slot.clearPricingTiers();\\n            showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers()).forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\\n        }\\n\\n        slot = showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n\\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE) {\\n            try {\\n                ebEventSyncService.updateEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), toEbUpdateRequest(slot));\\n                if (request.capacity() != null && !request.capacity().equals(previousCapacity)) {\\n                    ebCapacityService.updateCapacityTier(slot.getEbEventId(), request.capacity());\\n                }\\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n                slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n                throw ex;\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        return slot;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public boolean cancelSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Slot already cancelled\\\", \\\"SLOT_ALREADY_CANCELLED\\\");\\n        }\\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.CANCEL);\\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n\\n        boolean ebCancelled = true;\\n        try {\\n            if (slot.getEbEventId() != null) {\\n                ebEventSyncService.cancelEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId());\\n            }\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            ebCancelled = false;\\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n        }\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ShowSlotCancelledEvent(slot.getId(), slot.getEbEventId(), organizationId, slot.getVenueId(), slot.getCityId()));\\n        return ebCancelled;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void retrySync(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\\n        if (slot.getStatus() != ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Slot is not pending sync\\\", \\\"SLOT_NOT_PENDING\\\");\\n        }\\n        if (slot.getEbEventId() == null) {\\n            submitSlot(organizationId, slotId);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(\\n            slot.getId(),\\n            slot.getEbEventId(),\\n            slot.getPricingTiers().stream().map(ShowSlotPricingTier::getId).toList(),\\n            slot.getSeatingMode(),\\n            organizationId,\\n            slot.getSourceSeatMapId()\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public ShowSlot getSlot(Long slotId) {\\n        return getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public List<ShowSlotOccurrence> listOccurrences(Long slotId) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\\n        if (!slot.isRecurring()) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Slot is not recurring\\\", \\\"SLOT_NOT_RECURRING\\\");\\n        }\\n        return occurrenceRepository.findByParentSlotIdOrderByOccurrenceIndexAsc(slotId);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Page<ShowSlot> listSlots(Long organizationId, ShowSlotStatus status, Long venueId, Long cityId,\\n                                    Instant startAfter, int page, int size) {\\n        Specification<ShowSlot> spec = (root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\\\"organizationId\\\"), organizationId);\\n        if (status != null) {\\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\\\"status\\\"), status));\\n        }\\n        if (venueId != null) {\\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\\\"venueId\\\"), venueId));\\n        }\\n        if (cityId != null) {\\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\\\"cityId\\\"), cityId));\\n        }\\n        if (startAfter != null) {\\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.greaterThan(root.get(\\\"startTime\\\"), startAfter));\\n        }\\n        return showSlotRepository.findAll(spec, PageRequest.of(page, size));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Page<ShowSlot> listMismatches(Long organizationId, int page, int size) {\\n        return showSlotRepository.findByOrganizationIdAndStatusAndLastSyncErrorIsNotNull(\\n            organizationId,\\n            ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE,\\n            PageRequest.of(page, size)\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private ShowSlot getSlotOrThrow(Long slotId) {\\n        return showSlotRepository.findById(slotId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new SchedulingNotFoundException(\\\"Slot not found: \\\" + slotId, \\\"SLOT_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    private EbEventCreateRequest toEbCreateRequest(ShowSlot slot) {\\n        return new EbEventCreateRequest(\\n            slot.getTitle(),\\n            slot.getDescription(),\\n            slot.getVenueId().toString(),\\n            slot.getStartTime(),\\n            slot.getEndTime(),\\n            slot.getCapacity(),\\n            slot.isRecurring(),\\n            null\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private EbEventUpdateRequest toEbUpdateRequest(ShowSlot slot) {\\n        return new EbEventUpdateRequest(\\n            slot.getTitle(),\\n            slot.getDescription(),\\n            slot.getStartTime(),\\n            slot.getEndTime()\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

  }
}

    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_o9Tiaf1ncvu73FX0vBaZmsmI",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/ShowSlotService.java\n@@\n-    public Page<ShowSlot> listSlots(Long organizationId, ShowSlotStatus status, Long venueId, Long cityId,\n-                                    Instant startAfter, int page, int size) {\n+    public Page<ShowSlot> listSlots(Long organizationId, ShowSlotStatus status, Long venueId, Long cityId,\n+                                    java.time.ZonedDateTime startAfter, int page, int size) {\n@@\n-        if (startAfter != null) {\n+        if (startAfter != null) {\n             spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.greaterThan(root.get(\\\"startTime\\\"), startAfter));\n         }\n         return showSlotRepository.findAll(spec, PageRequest.of(page, size));\n     }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

## Entry 960
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:16:43.319Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:16:43.319Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_VDmtFGzvQJSaAu72XXvAitjB",
    "output": "Chunk ID: fbfa73\nWall time: 0.0523 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 536\nOutput:\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public Page<ShowSlot> listSlots(Long organizationId, ShowSlotStatus status, Long venueId, Long cityId,\n                                    Instant startAfter, int page, int size) {\n        Specification<ShowSlot> spec = (root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\"organizationId\"), organizationId);\n        if (status != null) {\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\"status\"), status));\n        }\n        if (venueId != null) {\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\"venueId\"), venueId));\n        }\n        if (cityId != null) {\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\"cityId\"), cityId));\n        }\n        if (startAfter != null) {\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.greaterThan(root.get(\"startTime\"), startAfter));\n        }\n        return showSlotRepository.findAll(spec, PageRequest.of(page, size));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public Page<ShowSlot> listMismatches(Long organizationId, int page, int size) {\n        return showSlotRepository.findByOrganizationIdAndStatusAndLastSyncErrorIsNotNull(\n            organizationId,\n            ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE,\n            PageRequest.of(page, size)\n        );\n    }\n\n    private ShowSlot getSlotOrThrow(Long slotId) {\n        return showSlotRepository.findById(slotId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new SchedulingNotFoundException(\"Slot not found: \" + slotId, \"SLOT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n    }\n\n    private EbEventCreateRequest toEbCreateRequest(ShowSlot slot) {\n        return new EbEventCreateRequest(\n            slot.getTitle(),\n            slot.getDescription(),\n            slot.getVenueId().toString(),\n            slot.getStartTime(),\n            slot.getEndTime(),\n            slot.getCapacity(),\n            slot.isRecurring(),\n            null\n        );\n    }\n\n    private EbEventUpdateRequest toEbUpdateRequest(ShowSlot slot) {\n        return new EbEventUpdateRequest(\n            slot.getTitle(),\n            slot.getDescription(),\n            slot.getStartTime(),\n            slot.getEndTime()\n        );\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 968
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:17:01.393Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:17:01.393Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/SlotReconciliationJob.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbEventSyncService;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class SlotReconciliationJob {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(SlotReconciliationJob.class);\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\\n    private final EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService;\\n\\n    public SlotReconciliationJob(\\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\\n        EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService\\n    ) {\\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\\n        this.ebEventSyncService = ebEventSyncService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Scheduled(fixedDelayString = \\\"${eventbrite.slot.reconcile.delay-ms:3600000}\\\")\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void reconcile() {\\n        List<ShowSlot> activeSlots = showSlotRepository.findAll().stream()\\n            .filter(slot -> slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE && slot.getEbEventId() != null)\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        for (ShowSlot slot : activeSlots) {\\n            try {\\n                EbEventDto ebEvent = ebEventSyncService.getEventById(slot.getEbEventId());\\n                if (ebEvent == null || ebEvent.state() == null || !\\\"LIVE\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(ebEvent.state())) {\\n                    slot.recordSyncFailure(\\\"EB event not live or missing on reconciliation\\\");\\n                    showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n                }\\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n                log.warn(\\\"Slot reconciliation failed. slotId={} ebEventId={}\\\", slot.getId(), slot.getEbEventId(), ex);\\n            } catch (Exception ex) {\\n                log.warn(\\\"Unexpected slot reconciliation error. slotId={} ebEventId={}\\\", slot.getId(), slot.getEbEventId(), ex);\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_gU30OsbYHailGwfM3WZ6yT3K"
  }
}
```

org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class SlotReconciliationJob {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(SlotReconciliationJob.class);\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\\n    private final EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService;\\n\\n    public SlotReconciliationJob(\\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\\n        EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService\\n    ) {\\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\\n        this.ebEventSyncService = ebEventSyncService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Scheduled(fixedDelayString = \\\"${eventbrite.slot.reconcile.delay-ms:3600000}\\\")\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void reconcile() {\\n        List<ShowSlot> activeSlots = showSlotRepository.findAll().stream()\\n            .filter(slot -> slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE && slot.getEbEventId() != null)\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        for (ShowSlot slot : activeSlots) {\\n            try {\\n                EbEventDto ebEvent = ebEventSyncService.getEventById(slot.getEbEventId());\\n                if (ebEvent == null || ebEvent.state() == null || !\\\"LIVE\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(ebEvent.state())) {\\n                    slot.recordSyncFailure(\\\"EB event not live or missing on reconciliation\\\");\\n                    showSlotRepository.save(slot);\\n                }\\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n                log.warn(\\\"Slot reconciliation failed. slotId={} ebEventId={}\\\", slot.getId(), slot.getEbEventId(), ex);\\n            } catch (Exception ex) {\\n ## Entry 973
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:17:10.583Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:17:10.583Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/event/listener/TicketSyncCompletedListener.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.event.listener;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.ShowSlotService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.context.event.EventListener;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class TicketSyncCompletedListener {\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotService showSlotService;\\n    private final Long defaultOrgId;\\n\\n    public TicketSyncCompletedListener(ShowSlotService showSlotService, @Value(\\\"${app.default-org-id}\\\") Long defaultOrgId) {\\n        this.showSlotService = showSlotService;\\n        this.defaultOrgId = defaultOrgId;\\n    }\\n\\n    @EventListener\\n    public void onTicketSyncCompleted(TicketSyncCompletedEvent event) {\\n        showSlotService.onTicketSyncComplete(event, defaultOrgId);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_HKyjQe1xRno3BiCGskansj9z"
  }
}
```

    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/event/listener/TicketSyncFailedListener.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.event.listener;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.ShowSlotService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncFailedEvent;\\nimport org.springframework.context.event.EventListener;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class TicketSyncFailedListener {\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotService showSlotService;\\n\\n    public TicketSyncFailedListener(ShowSlotService showSlotService) {\\n        this.showSlotService = showSlotService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @EventListener\\n    public void onTicketSyncFailed(TicketSyncFailedEvent event) {\\n        showSlotService.onTicketSyncFailed(event);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:17:53.935Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Clarifying error response codes and planning controller endpoints**\n\nDecided to use 422 for BusinessRuleException despite spec conflict with 409 for conflicts, aligning with error handling standards. Planning ShowSlotController with diverse endpoints covering create, submit, update, cancel, retry, and multiple gets, including query param parsing for mismatches with orgId required and date-time formatting, and mapping domain objects via showSlotMapper."
  }
}
```

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:18:23.171Z",

  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/api/controller/ShowSlotController.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.controller;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.CreateShowSlotRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.UpdateShowSlotRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotCancelResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotRetryResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotSubmitResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotOccurrence;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.mapper.ShowSlotMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.ShowSlotService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PageResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.Roles;\\nimport jakarta.validation.Valid;\\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.format.annotation.DateTimeFormat;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\\n\\n@RestController\\n@RequestMapping(\\\"/api/v1/scheduling/slots\\\")\\npublic class ShowSlotController {\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotService showSlotService;\\n    private final ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper;\\n\\n    public ShowSlotController(ShowSlotService showSlotService, ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper) {\\n        this.showSlotService = showSlotService;\\n        this.showSlotMapper = showSlotMapper;\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping\\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.CREATED)\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotResponse createSlot(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @Valid @RequestBody CreateShowSlotRequest request\\n    ) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.createSlot(organizationId, request);\\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(slot);\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping(\\\"/{id}/submit\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotSubmitResponse submitSlot(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId\\n    ) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.submitSlot(organizationId, slotId);\\n        return new ShowSlotSubmitResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getSyncAttemptCount(), \\\"EB sync initiated\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{id}\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotResponse getSlot(@PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId) {\\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(showSlotService.getSlot(slotId));\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listSlots(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"status\\\", required = false) ShowSlotStatus status,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"venueId\\\", required = false) Long venueId,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"cityId\\\", required = false) Long cityId,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"startAfter\\\", required = false) @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) ZonedDateTime startAfter,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"page\\\", defaultValue = \\\"0\\\") int page,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"size\\\", defaultValue = \\\"20\\\") int size\\n    ) {\\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listSlots(organizationId, status, venueId, cityId, startAfter, page, size);\\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\\n    }\\n\\n    @PutMapping(\\\"/{id}\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotResponse updateSlot(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId,\\n        @Valid @RequestBody UpdateShowSlotRequest request\\n    ) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.updateSlot(organizationId, slotId, request);\\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(slot);\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping(\\\"/{id}/cancel\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotCancelResponse cancelSlot(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId\\n    ) {\\n        boolean ebCancelled = showSlotService.cancelSlot(organizationId, slotId);\\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.getSlot(slotId);\\n        return new ShowSlotCancelResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), ebCancelled, \\\"Slot cancelled\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping(\\\"/{id}/retry-sync\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotRetryResponse retrySync(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId\\n    ) {\\n        showSlotService.retrySync(organizationId, slotId);\\n        return new ShowSlotRetryResponse(ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC, \\\"Retry initiated\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{id}/occurrences\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse listOccurrences(@PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId) {\\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrence> occurrences = showSlotService.listOccurrences(slotId);\\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse> responseList = occurrences.stream()\\n            .map(showSlotMapper::toOccurrenceResponse)\\n            .toList();\\n        return new ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse(slotId, responseList);\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/mismatches\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listMismatches(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"page\\\", defaultValue = \\\"0\\\") int page,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"size\\\", defaultValue = \\\"20\\\") int size\\n    ) {\\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listMismatches(organizationId, page, size);\\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_s645QuM8m3R3CREwQxLvzi1M"
  }
}

@PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId\\n    ) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.submitSlot(organizationId, slotId);\\n        return new ShowSlotSubmitResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getSyncAttemptCount(), \\\"EB sync initiated\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{id}\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotResponse getSlot(@PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId) {\\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(showSlotService.getSlot(slotId));\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listSlots(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"status\\\", required = false) ShowSlotStatus status,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"venueId\\\", required = false) Long venueId,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"cityId\\\", required = false) Long cityId,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"startAfter\\\", required = false) @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) ZonedDateTime startAfter,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"page\\\", defaultValue = \\\"0\\\") int page,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"size\\\", defaultValue = \\\"20\\\") int size\\n    ) {\\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listSlots(organizationId, status, venueId, cityId, startAfter, page, size);\\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\\n    }\\n\\n    @PutMapping(\\\"/{id}\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotResponse updateSlot(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId,\\n        @Valid @RequestBody UpdateShowSlotRequest request\\n    ) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.updateSlot(organizationId, slotId, request);\\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(slot);\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping(\\\"/{id}/cancel\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotCancelResponse cancelSlot(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId\\n    ) {\\n        boolean ebCancelled = showSlotService.cancelSlot(organizationId, slotId);\\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.getSlot(slotId);\\n        return new ShowSlotCancelResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), ebCancelled, \\\"Slot cancelled\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping(\\\"/{id}/retry-sync\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotRetryResponse retrySync(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId\\n    ) {\\n        showSlotService.retrySync(organizationId, slotId);\\n        return new ShowSlotRetryResponse(ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC, \\\"Retry initiated\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{id}/occurrences\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse listOccurrences(@PathVariable(\\\"id\\\") Long slotId) {\\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrence> occurrences = showSlotService.listOccurrences(slotId);\\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse> responseList = occurrences.stream()\\n            .map(showSlotMapper::toOccurrenceResponse)\\n            .toList();\\n        return new ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse(slotId, responseList);\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/mismatches\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listMismatches(\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long organizationId,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"page\\\", defaultValue = \\\"0\\\") int page,\\n        @RequestParam(name = \\\"size\\\", defaultValue = \\\"20\\\") int size\\n    ) {\\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listMismatches(organizationId, page, size);\\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

## Entry 1002

**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:18:53.767Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Clarifying slot cancellation and sync handling**\n\nThe cancelSlot method re-fetches the slot after cancellation, accepting extra DB cost but ensuring updated status. SlotConflictException needs handling to include alternative slots in errors. Also clarified the attachment of pricing tiers and occurrences to slots, and the plan to implement SlotReconciliationJob and related events. Noted some cleanup needed around unused Instant imports and refined sync failure recording logic."
  }
}
```

}

## Entry 1003
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:18:53.777Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:18:53.777Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Aligning sync failure states and planning migrations**\n\nThe workflow keeps status PENDING_SYNC on draft success and increments sync attempts on failures with error messages recorded. Cascade relationships for pricing tiers and occurrences are confirmed correct for persistence. Upcoming work includes creating SlotReconciliationJob, ConflictDetectionService, adding scheduling events, implementing missing exceptions, and crafting detailed migrations (V6–V9) with careful enum handling to ensure H2 compatibility by using VARCHAR and check constraints instead of CREATE TYPE."
  }
}
```

## Entry 1005
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:18:55.442Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:18:55.442Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V6__create_organization_auth_table.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: shared/eventbrite/ — never accessed directly by any application module\\nCREATE TABLE organization_auth (\\n    id                        BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    organization_id           BIGINT       NOT NULL UNIQUE,\\n    eb_organization_id        VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\n    access_token_encrypted    TEXT         NOT NULL,\\n    refresh_token_encrypted   TEXT,\\n    expires_at                TIMESTAMP,\\n    status                    VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING'\\n                              CONSTRAINT chk_org_auth_status CHECK (status IN ('PENDING', 'CONNECTED', 'TOKEN_EXPIRED', 'REVOKED')),\\n    created_at                TIMESTAMP    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at                TIMESTAMP    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_org_auth_org FOREIGN KEY (organization_id)\\n        REFERENCES organization(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\n);\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uk_org_auth_org      ON organization_auth(organization_id);\\nCREATE INDEX        idx_org_auth_status  ON organization_auth(status);\\nCREATE INDEX        idx_org_auth_eb_org  ON organization_auth(eb_organization_id);\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_JXmCZ0ZB0pIFNH4pXo5yKWKk"
  }
}
```

## Entry 1010
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:19:09.901Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:19:09.901Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V7__create_show_slot_table.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: scheduling module\\nCREATE TABLE show_slot (\\n    id                    BIGSERIAL    PRIMARY KEY,\\n    organization_id       BIGINT       NOT NULL,\\n    venue_id              BIGINT       NOT NULL,\\n    city_id               BIGINT       NOT NULL,\\n    title                 VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,\\n    description           TEXT,\\n    start_time            TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL,\\n    end_time              TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL,\\n    seating_mode          VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL\\n                           CONSTRAINT chk_slot_seating_mode CHECK (seating_mode IN ('GA', 'RESERVED')),\\n    capacity              INTEGER      NOT NULL,\\n    source_seatmap_id     VARCHAR(255),\\n    is_recurring          BOOLEAN      NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,\\n    recurrence_rule       TEXT,\\n    status                VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT'\\n                           CONSTRAINT chk_slot_status CHECK (status IN ('DRAFT', 'PENDING_SYNC', 'ACTIVE', 'CANCELLED')),\\n    eb_event_id           VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,\\n    eb_series_id          VARCHAR(255),\\n    sync_attempt_count    INTEGER      NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\n    last_sync_error       TEXT,\\n    last_attempted_at     TIMESTAMPTZ,\\n    created_at            TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at            TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_show_slot_org   FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organization(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_show_slot_venue FOREIGN KEY (venue_id)        REFERENCES venue(id)        ON DELETE RESTRICT,\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_show_slot_city  FOREIGN KEY (city_id)         REFERENCES city(id)         ON DELETE RESTRICT,\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_slot_times     CHECK (end_time > start_time),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_slot_capacity  CHECK (capacity > 0)\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_org_id     ON show_slot(organization_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_venue_id   ON show_slot(venue_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_city_id    ON show_slot(city_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_status     ON show_slot(status);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_eb_event   ON show_slot(eb_event_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_venue_time ON show_slot(venue_id, start_time, end_time);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_active_eb  ON show_slot(status, eb_event_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_org_city   ON show_slot(organization_id, city_id);\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_hE37AU9afWpU3vk7QV2XKKsS"
  }
}
```

    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V8__create_show_slot_occurrence_table.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: scheduling module\\nCREATE TABLE show_slot_occurrence (\\n    id                    BIGSERIAL   PRIMARY KEY,\\n    parent_slot_id        BIGINT      NOT NULL,\\n    occurrence_index      INTEGER     NOT NULL,\\n    start_time            TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,\\n    end_time              TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,\\n    status                VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE'\\n                           CONSTRAINT chk_occurrence_status CHECK (status IN ('DRAFT', 'PENDING_SYNC', 'ACTIVE', 'CANCELLED')),\\n    eb_event_id           VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,\\n    sync_attempt_count    INTEGER     NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\n    last_sync_error       TEXT,\\n    last_attempted_at     TIMESTAMPTZ,\\n    created_at            TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_occurrence_slot_time CHECK (end_time > start_time),\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_slot_occurrence FOREIGN KEY (parent_slot_id)\\n        REFERENCES show_slot(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\n    CONSTRAINT uk_occurrence_slot_index UNIQUE (parent_slot_id, occurrence_index)\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_occurrence_parent   ON show_slot_occurrence(parent_slot_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_occurrence_status   ON show_slot_occurrence(status);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_occurrence_eb_event ON show_slot_occurrence(eb_event_id);\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_uh0dHQlnzGlgo0CZEhCW9Tjx"
  }
}
```

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:19:32.402Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V9__create_show_slot_pricing_tier_table.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: scheduling module\\nCREATE TABLE show_slot_pricing_tier (\\n    id                    BIGSERIAL    PRIMARY KEY,\\n    slot_id               BIGINT       NOT NULL,\\n    name                  VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\n    price_amount          DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,\\n    currency              VARCHAR(3)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\\n    quota                 INTEGER      NOT NULL,\\n    tier_type             VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PAID'\\n                           CONSTRAINT chk_tier_type CHECK (tier_type IN ('FREE', 'PAID', 'DONATION')),\\n    eb_ticket_class_id    VARCHAR(255),\\n    eb_inventory_tier_id  VARCHAR(255),\\n    created_at            TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at            TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_tier_slot FOREIGN KEY (slot_id)\\n        REFERENCES show_slot(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_quota_positive   CHECK (quota > 0),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_price_free       CHECK (\\n        (tier_type = 'FREE' AND price_amount = 0.00) OR\\n        (tier_type != 'FREE')\\n    )\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_pricing_tier_slot   ON show_slot_pricing_tier(slot_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_pricing_tier_eb     ON show_slot_pricing_tier(eb_ticket_class_id);\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_lSweO8CXkmd5xAjIPpG3iiNZ"
  }
}
```

    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Reviewing scheduling and slot sync logic**\n\nI've clarified how failure recording and sync attempts update slot status, confirmed state machine transitions handle retries by reapplying the same status, and noted the need to allow CANCEL only from ACTIVE. Next, I'll implement the reconciliation job querying all slots."
  }
}
```

    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/pom.xml <<'EOF'\\n<?xml version=\\\"1.0\\\" encoding=\\\"UTF-8\\\"?>\\n<project xmlns=\\\"http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0\\\" xmlns:xsi=\\\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\\\"\\n         xsi:schemaLocation=\\\"http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd\\\">\\n    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>\\n\\n    <parent>\\n        <groupId>com.eventplatform</groupId>\\n        <artifactId>multi-city-event-booking</artifactId>\\n        <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>\\n    </parent>\\n\\n    <artifactId>booking-inventory</artifactId>\\n    <packaging>jar</packaging>\\n\\n    <dependencies>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>com.eventplatform</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>shared</artifactId>\\n            <version>${project.version}</version>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId>\\n        </dependency>\\n\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>\\n            <scope>test</scope>\\n        </dependency>\\n        <dependency>\\n            <groupId>com.tngtech.archunit</groupId>\\n            <artifactId>archunit-junit5</artifactId>\\n            <scope>test</scope>\\n        </dependency>\\n    </dependencies>\\n</project>\\nEOF\"}",

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:20:54.127Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/client/SchedulingSlotClient.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.IntegrationException;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClientResponseException;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SchedulingSlotClient {\\n\\n    private final RestClient restClient;\\n\\n    public SchedulingSlotClient(@Value(\\\"${app.internal-base-url:http://localhost:8080}\\\") String baseUrl) {\\n        this.restClient = RestClient.builder().baseUrl(baseUrl).build();\\n    }\\n\\n    public SchedulingSlotResponse getSlot(Long slotId) {\\n        try {\\n            return restClient.get()\\n                .uri(\\\"/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}\\\", slotId)\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .body(SchedulingSlotResponse.class);\\n        } catch (RestClientResponseException ex) {\\n            if (ex.getStatusCode() == HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND) {\\n                throw new IntegrationException(\\\"Slot not found via scheduling\\\", \\\"SCHEDULING_NOT_FOUND\\\");\\n            }\\n            throw new IntegrationException(\\\"Failed to fetch slot from scheduling\\\", \\\"SCHEDULING_INTEGRATION_ERROR\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_0gxJvfvoxXHAlWQTUTKETg1H"
  }
}

}

## Entry 1078
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:21:13.413Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:21:13.413Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/SlotTicketSyncService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotClient;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.SlotDraftCreatedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncFailedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbInventoryTierRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbTicketClassRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTicketService;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SlotTicketSyncService {\\n\\n    private final EbTicketService ebTicketService;\\n    private final SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient;\\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n\\n    public SlotTicketSyncService(\\n        EbTicketService ebTicketService,\\n        SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient,\\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\\n    ) {\\n        this.ebTicketService = ebTicketService;\\n        this.schedulingSlotClient = schedulingSlotClient;\\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void syncTickets(SlotDraftCreatedEvent event) {\\n        try {\\n            SchedulingSlotResponse slot = schedulingSlotClient.getSlot(event.slotId());\\n            List<EbTicketClassRequest> ticketClasses = slot.pricingTiers().stream()\\n                .map(tier -> new EbTicketClassRequest(\\n                    tier.name(),\\n                    new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\\n                    tier.quota(),\\n                    tier.tierType()\\n                ))\\n                .toList();\\n\\n            ebTicketService.createTicketClasses(event.ebEventId(), ticketClasses);\\n\\n            List<EbInventoryTierRequest> inventoryTiers = slot.pricingTiers().stream()\\n                .map(tier -> new EbInventoryTierRequest(tier.name(), tier.quota()))\\n                .toList();\\n            ebTicketService.createInventoryTiers(event.ebEventId(), inventoryTiers);\\n\\n            if (slot.seatingMode() == SeatingMode.RESERVED && slot.sourceSeatMapId() != null) {\\n                ebTicketService.copySeatMap(event.ebEventId(), slot.sourceSeatMapId());\\n            }\\n\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new TicketSyncCompletedEvent(event.slotId(), event.ebEventId()));\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new TicketSyncFailedEvent(event.slotId(), event.ebEventId(), ex.getMessage()));\\n            throw ex;\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new TicketSyncFailedEvent(event.slotId(), event.ebEventId(), ex.getMessage()));\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_UDUIYvQeICAazzzAvoHglADl"
  }

{
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/SlotTicketSyncService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotClient;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.SlotDraftCreatedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncFailedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbInventoryTierRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbTicketClassRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTicketService;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SlotTicketSyncService {\\n\\n    private final EbTicketService ebTicketService;\\n    private final SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient;\\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n\\n    public SlotTicketSyncService(\\n        EbTicketService ebTicketService,\\n        SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient,\\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\\n    ) {\\n        this.ebTicketService = ebTicketService;\\n        this.schedulingSlotClient = schedulingSlotClient;\\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void syncTickets(SlotDraftCreatedEvent event) {\\n        try {\\n            SchedulingSlotResponse slot = schedulingSlotClient.getSlot(event.slotId());\\n            List<EbTicketClassRequest> ticketClasses = slot.pricingTiers().stream()\\n                .map(tier -> new EbTicketClassRequest(\\n                    tier.name(),\\n                    new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\\n                    tier.quota(),\\n                    tier.tierType()\\n                ))\\n                .toList();\\n\\n            ebTicketService.createTicketClasses(event.ebEventId(), ticketClasses);\\n\\n            List<EbInventoryTierRequest> inventoryTiers = slot.pricingTiers().stream()\\n                .map(tier -> new EbInventoryTierRequest(tier.name(), tier.quota()))\\n                .toList();\\n            ebTicketService.createInventoryTiers(event.ebEventId(), inventoryTiers);\\n\\n            if (slot.seatingMode() == SeatingMode.RESERVED && slot.sourceSeatMapId() != null) {\\n                ebTicketService.copySeatMap(event.ebEventId(), slot.sourceSeatMapId());\\n            }\\n\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new TicketSyncCompletedEvent(event.slotId(), event.ebEventId()));\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new TicketSyncFailedEvent(event.slotId(), event.ebEventId(), ex.getMessage()));\\n            throw ex;\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new TicketSyncFailedEvent(event.slotId(), event.ebEventId(), ex.getMessage()));\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_UDUIYvQeICAazzzAvoHglADl"
  }
}

## Entry 1102
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:22:08.165Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:22:08.165Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > admin/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/admin/service/OrgOAuthService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.admin.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrganizationAuth;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTokenStore;\\nimport java.time.Duration;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.UUID;\\nimport java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class OrgOAuthService {\\n\\n    private static final Duration STATE_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(10);\\n\\n    private final EbTokenStore tokenStore;\\n    private final String clientId;\\n    private final String redirectUri;\\n    private final Map<String, StateEntry> stateStore = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\\n\\n    public OrgOAuthService(\\n        EbTokenStore tokenStore,\\n        @Value(\\\"${eventbrite.oauth.client-id:}\\\") String clientId,\\n        @Value(\\\"${eventbrite.oauth.redirect-uri:}\\\") String redirectUri\\n    ) {\\n        this.tokenStore = tokenStore;\\n        this.clientId = clientId;\\n        this.redirectUri = redirectUri;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String buildAuthorizationUrl(Long orgId) {\\n        String state = UUID.randomUUID().toString();\\n        stateStore.put(state, new StateEntry(orgId, Instant.now()));\\n        return \\\"https://www.eventbrite.com/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=%s&redirect_uri=%s&state=%s\\\"\\n            .formatted(clientId, redirectUri, state);\\n    }\\n\\n    public OrganizationAuth handleCallback(Long orgId, String code, String state) {\\n        validateState(orgId, state);\\n        return tokenStore.connectOrganization(orgId, code, redirectUri);\\n    }\\n\\n    public OrganizationAuth getStatus(Long orgId) {\\n        return tokenStore.getAuth(orgId);\\n    }\\n\\n    public void disconnect(Long orgId) {\\n        tokenStore.disconnect(orgId);\\n    }\\n\\n    private void validateState(Long orgId, String state) {\\n        StateEntry entry = stateStore.remove(state);\\n        if (entry == null || !entry.orgId().equals(orgId)) {\\n            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"Invalid OAuth state\\\");\\n        }\\n        if (entry.createdAt().isBefore(Instant.now().minus(STATE_TTL))) {\\n            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"OAuth state expired\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private record StateEntry(Long orgId, Instant createdAt) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_s8Ff2p8owuXPMYoK3n1jYbLJ"
  }
}
```

tokenStore;\\n    private final String clientId;\\n    private final String redirectUri;\\n    private final Map<String, StateEntry> stateStore = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\\n\\n    public IllegalArgumentException(\\\"OAuth state expired\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private record StateEntry(Long orgId, Instant createdAt) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
